s̴̡̢̞̯͎̞̟͚͕͙͕̗̭͖̦̼̫̰͚̅̄̎͐̐͆͛͂͂̐͆̉̓͛̅̈́̀͌̿̅̒̚̕͘̚͘͝͝ợ̴̡̧̢̡̰̱̺͖̞͇͇̠̣͕̣̼͔̤̯̞̼̞̼͗̈͗̾̋̀͗́̋̇̈̂̒͒̀̽͒̀̑͋̓̈́̂͛̒̿́̓͑͒̿̀̓̍̊̑͂͘͘̕͜͝͝͝͝r̷̡̨̢̧̢̛̛̬̺̳͓̗̭͓̯̯̭͖̣̼̺͚͓͚̳͔̟͉̱̠͓͕̰̩̥̙͇̼͎̱̫͋̓̒͛͌͊̈̿̐̑͑̊̊́̂̎̑̌̂̋̋͜͜͜͠ͅr̵̨̨̧̢̡̛̛͙̣̖̮͎͎̦̼̻͎̖̻͕̥̮͖̝͙̤̦̦̘̪͎̻̰̽͆͑̈́͑͌̋̈͒̋̈́̓̂̃͒̈̈́͛̓͗̍͑͘̕͘̕͝͝͠͝ͅy̸̛̛̩̖͉͊͌̓̅͊̊͋̀͐̐̍͂̐̎̌͂͗̍̇̃̉̓́̚͝͠ ̶̨̢̧̧͉̯̳͚̲̪̥̥͖̠̤͉̼̹̹̝͍͔̤̝̩̑͂̍̑̐͜͝͠s̶̡̛̺̣̲͓͔͑̎̎̎̇͒̓̑̈̔̄͋̅̅̍̐̇͊̿̈͌͛̀̔̑̊̈́̾̇̈́̃̃̾͂̆̒͗̚̚͝͝ơ̴̡̧̬͚͎̙͖̬͔̖̟̭͖͎̲̼̩̔̅̃͆͑̐͂̈́͛͌̂̅͛̀̄͑͛̃̏̽̊̋̄̿͘͝͝͝r̶̨̢̧̡͖͈̙͔͎͉̤̣͉̖͙͕̠̝̻͇̟͍̤̺̼̳̳͓͍̹̠̣͖̜̬͔͎̣̩͉̬̅̀͋̏̋̆̋͗͛͜ͅͅͅͅř̶̢̨̡̡̧̲̗͎̺̖̝̗̯͇͓̞͕͔͚̗̮̞̫̦͙̤͉̟̥͊̊̈́́͋̽͌͆̂͗͆̀͐̈́̃͗̀̚̕͜͝y̴̡̢̡̢̝̭̣͉̤͔̗̮̭͚̟̣͔̫̯̦̼͈̻̬̜͓̟̒̓͋̑́̉̊̊͊̓͒̈̆̇͌̃̑͋̑̋̿͑́͒͆̎̆̀͋̈́́͊̑́̎̌̾̚̚̕͠͝͠͝͝ ̴̛̳̳̪̳̮̪̩̅̓̓͑͋̃̔̌̓͑̎̇̄͂̊̈́͒́̿͆̾͛̒̽̑̓͐̽́̐̍̓̓̓͘͘͝s̸̺͚̳̥̼̣̏̐̑̈́̉͊͂̋̇̌̅̀̀̐̽͋̌̂̃́̅́͆̈́̂͐́́̚͘ơ̵̡̧̛͚̭̘̥͇̺͙̟͈͙̜͇̳̗̮̬̼̙͔̝̰̔̓͌͂̆̊̂̐͋̏̑͛̔̌̆̽̈́̅̍̌̓́͑͋̉̀͐͐͒̀̆͋̑̚̕͜͠͝͝ͅͅŗ̴̪̬̦̠̻̙̱̰̯̯͙̮̯̠̫̘̯̞̬̺̥͒͗͒̔͊͌̈͆ͅͅr̶̛̹̭̮̼͍͔̽͂̄̂̽̐̿͐̀̀̎͑̏͛̒̓̀̈́͛̚̚͝ͅy̸̧̢̨̢̡̢̡̡̮͖͈̲͖̻̳̪̫̞͙̺̣̘̤̞̗̲͍̺̲̯̟̤̦̘̲͓̙̅̋̈̃̎͋̎̈́̉̂̊̍̉͆̈́͒́͂̍̀̑͛̒͜͜͠͝

̶̨̨̡̛̛̬̭̳͉͔͔̱̗̬͎̦̤͖̗̫̉̃̿̏̽̈͛̓͛͐̾͆͌͗͐͊͊͐̇̄̆̽̈́́̓̄̑́̏̐̍̓͗̂̄̕͘͜͝͝ͅͅw̷̷̵̸̶̶̷̵̴̶̷̸̷̸̷̸̵̸̴̸̴̵̸̷̶̴̴̶̵̸̸̵̴̵̷̶̵̷̢̡̨̢̡̨̨̢̢̡̨̢̨̧̡̧̨̨̡̡̧̢̡̡̡̢̡̨̧̢̨̢̢̨̢̡̡̡̧̢̢̡̢̧̢̨̡̧̡̢̢̢̢̢̡̧̨̢̡̨̨̡̢̡̡̢̢̧̨̧̨̨̨̧̢̧̧̡̡̡̧̧̢̧̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̜͖̹̹̹̬̝̬̹̱͓̲͎̤̪̖͍̳̣̺̖͔̖͉̬̼̩̪͍̞̫̥̙͓̦̥̺̲͚̲̙̼̙̹̟̞̪͚̱̫̻͎͔̼̻͍͎̩̼̜̟͉̙̩̬͚̩̫̙͙͎͙̜̭̺̩͕͖̰̟͉͇͓̳̻̲̜̩̻̥͎̝̟͓̦̣̯̗̳̯͙͚̹͕̻̲̩͉̜̭̥̱̺̜̤̙̦̣͎̤͕̻̙͙̤̙͍͓̪͔͎̫͓͉̯̬̻͔̖̻͓̹̮͕̗̱͚̜̻̮͙̝̩͎͍̱̩̹̤̤̺͔͕̳͕͍͓͇̺̭͎̹͔͔̘͉̬̺̟͎̻̥͇̤̟͉͇̥̖̭̣̺̤̪͉̮̜̲̱̪̘͉̙̠̟̦̻͔̻̙̯͖̬̠͚̭̪̖̬̳̫̦̟͍͔͕̪̙͎̗̳͚̜̤͈̫̣̦͔̞͙̯̼̰̰̥̙̳͙̥̞̟͍̳̘̭̙͇͔̭͕͇͎͙̠̲̥̮͙̜̰̖̘̠̜̮̜̟̻̙̗̻̜͇̰̲̥̣͔̝̫̻̙̩̫͔͓͔̙̖̳̻̬͎͎̩̙̳̼̪̫͚͇͈̬̖͚̪̭̦͚̠̱̣̠̭͔̼̫̹̖̙̼͇͖̺͎͓̺̥͍̞̻̙̘̬̺̭̠͍̘̞͇̭̹̙̜̹̠̱̲̦̱͎̗̝̯̫̻̼͖̜̞̻͍͎̪̭̘̠̹̩̙̲̹̤̣̟̖̫̙̩̼̼̺̤͕̰̪̪̹̗̫̟̤͈̘͈͔̙̱͖̥̙̮͕̫͍̠̟͙͇̮͙̯̩͕͔̣̭̦͉͈͉̩̬̤̯̲̥̟̗̲̳͕͓͕͇͔̟̹͍̳͎͚̘̖̫̬͙̦͎̳̙̳̲̟̜̱̮̼̳̥͍͈̝̣̣̮͙̟̲̯̜̗̳̜͔͖̦̯̙̹͖̟͙͎̥͍̺͔̲̩̠͓̩͔̤͈̻͇̘̪̬̣̤̝͍͎͙̥͕̮̭̤͕̙͖͈̲̙̤̖̯͉͓͖̪̩͚̲̖͕͈̙̬͈̦̮̠̮̥͇̫̯̪̯̗̱̥̭̜͔̮͔̲͇͓̹͕͕͎͉̯̯̭̤͍͙̳̪͓͎̥̘̙͈̯̠̝̮͈̱̮̝̜̳͉̜̳̠̤̦̩͉̳̼͚͍̮͉̞̜̜͓̫͓͇̻̯͎̬̟̬̺̙̳̼̙̮̼͔̙̮̺̠̰̤̠̘̯̭͖̼̟͚̯̟͉̺̪͇̖̳̱̭̰̣̭̮̣͓̟̰̙̜̲͔̯͖͍͖̬̼͉͇̭͉͚̺̯̣͉̗̺̤̼̯̱͕͔̠̗͈̜̘̱̠̘̖̘̫̲̘͉̰̟̯̜̳͚̫̖͙̗̤̟̤̘̰̲̙̥͚͉̥̰͔͎̳̱̬̠̮̟̜̦̖̫͙̪̗̺̳͕̳̮͚̤̯̲̻̥̠̖̝̻̲̠͉̜͚͒́̾̾̇̎̈́̉̈́̈́͋̽̀̅̒̊̂̃̔̓̇͐̈́̅̽̅̿́̎̌͌̈́̒̽͆̾̽̾́̒͊͒͗͆̂̎́̓̆͆́́̎̽̈̈́͗̈́̏͂̃̊͆̄̎̍̊̑̀̔̅́̀̉̂͒̉͒̈́̏͂̅̐̓̈́͂̃́͐̀̔̍̇͒̏̇͆̾̍̀͛̽͗̊̋͋͊̇͗͐̓̽́̄͆̔͑́̀̂̂̿́̈̈́̑̊̔̓͛͊̉͛̉̑͊͊́̂͛͂͒̇͐̀̊͛̓̌̑̍̿̏̆̌̾̐̓͂̅̒̂̓̅̽̄̈́̅̆̍̂̐̈́̋͛̑͗̇̈́̓͑̈̏̇͂̓̍̈́̈̐̂̑͌͑͆̓̈́͊̑̊͒̇̆̉̈́̀͗̆͛̌̇͑̈́̒͋̌̑̿͆̑̒́̄͒͒̔̀͂̐̂̑͌̀͛͑͑́̇͌̉̇̎̽̏͑̔͋̓͒͌͋͆́̋͌͛̿̍̈́͋̽͋́̂͛̃̅̈̑̓́̓̔̑̽͆̔̋̀̿́̉̎̈́̐̐̅̓͗̈͆̽̃̎͌̆̈͊̄͒̈̾̽̉́́̈́̔̓̽̄̔͋̓̈́̏̔̓̉͊̾̈̓̔͋̏̌̏̀͒͗̎́̈́͛͒̌̄͐͋̒͊̑͑̌́̉͑̀͆͌̉̈̈́̈́̒̂̈́͂͑̐͊̌͌͋̉̎́̂͛͛̐̓̀̈͗̈͆͆͒̏̆͒̆̄͑̋̉̉͑̈́̆̆͌͑̀́͆̂̑́̓͂̍̑̌̃̌̓́̇̌́̑͊̓̔̌̈̓́͗̀̌̌̄̃͊̈͊͑̂̔͑̔̀͐̋̓̾̔̎̇̀͗̇͆͆̈̀̈́̋́̓̎̑̅̓͂̔̂͂͑͐̃͂̑̈́͌́̀̀̔̔̐̒̈̆̉͒̇̅͐̆̈́̾́̀̈́̈̓̃̌̈̉̃̉̇̒̀̀̌̾̃̆͛̈̔̂̈̀͋̏͑͛̄͊̊̾̀͆̊́͂͐̑̃̌̇͌̆̊̈́͊̃̇̏̒͑͊̅̉́͒͗̇̇̾͌̊̓̊͌̌͐̔̎̀͆̿̿̒̆́͂̅͋̔͐̍̋̀͋̊̈́̄̋̓̐͐͒̾̈́̎̈́̉̾̆́͛̇̔͛̿͛̅̃̑͗̇̏̾̋̿͌́́̒̈͗̌̈́͆̀̓̈͂̏̾̈́̽̿̀̈́̔͛̏̉̿͑̈̿͊̿̄͑͐͐̿̀̓̀̋̈́̈́̊̎̍̄̀̀̑̈́̿́̏̌̐̈́͑̏͋̓̑̓͑̇̍̋͛̂͐͋̐͑̓̊͗̂̆̉̈́͊̍̐́̔͐́͊͒̍͋͊̈͋͌̈́͑̂͛̏͆̽̉̅͗͗͂̉̿̂͐̔̍͌̆̃̄̀͐̈́̓̄̄̔̍̀̆̆̿̿̎͑̓̓̈́̉̇̋͒́̓͊̓̇͆̈́͗̑̑̈́͂̅̔͂͑͗̎͆͑̈́̆̄̉̄̒̿̇̀̍̉̓̿̃̈́̉̃͌̎̍̋̋̆̃̓̇̈́͊͌͌͛̀̓̔̾̂͛̓̽̍͛̐̅̔͗̓͛̾̑̔͒̋̾̑̑̍́͛̅́̎̐̀͆̿̈́͊́́̀̾́̄͑̀̓̓͊̄̔̏̾͆͋̄̈́̎̄̅̒͋̒̐̄́̌̓͂̀͐̑̈́̾̃̆̆̚̚̕͘̕͘̕̚̕̚͘̚̕̚͘͘̕͘̚͘̚͘̕͘͘̚̕͘̚͘̕̚̕̚̕̚̚͘̕͘̚̕͘͘̕͘̕̚̕̚̕̚͘̕̕̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̵̸̸̵̷̸̸̷̶̵̷̵̵̵̵̴̵̷̴̵̸̸̴̴̢̡̧̨̢̢̡̢̨̡̧̡̧̧̧̨̢̢̨̢̨̢̨̨̢̨̨̨̡̧̨̢̢̢̧̢̡̢̨̡̡̢̢̨̢̨̧̡̡̢̧̧̧̧̢̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̦̣̳͇̟͍̖̘̼̟͈̩̬͖̯͖̯̜̭̮͉̝̺̲̮͔͔̮̲̘̦̹̦̜̮̩̞͖̮̫̥̰̮̪͔̺̻͔͕͕̥̭̤̝͙͖̠̤̮̥͕̠͚̤̭̗͈̰̥͕̤͎̞͙̳̭̦̲͉̰͖̫̞̯̭̜̖͉̩̗̮̯̤̰͔͖̳̞̠̪̜̗̬͈̩̩̠̝̰̘͍͙̫͕͖̖̞̦̪͈̫͇̪̝͖̱̣̟̗̪̗͙͚̞͍̲͔̺̯̦̪͓̜̬͔͍͎̗̱̪͕̳͓͓̖̣̝͔̯̭̩͉̞͍̣̝̣̣̤͙̰͎̞̥̠͙͓̘̬͕̘͚͍͕̜̦̥̘̖̪̼͕͕̲̻̰̰͚̘̮̲̪̺̤̻͉̟͇̤̳͍͚͙͇̤̝̻̠̳̼̱͇͕̱̖͚̭͓͈̯̱͉̫̬͎͈̣̥̹̭͚̺̝̫̗͙̦̠̯̹͔̼͙̘͖̤̙͙͔̦̭̗̮̣̲̥̗͈̣͕̟̮̮̬̳̪̻̼̮̭͎̹̭͕̦̺̖̮̠̝̖͓̙̮̥̜̪̬̗͈̠̪̞͍̰̺͈̗̤͎̭̣̫̱̯͍̠͕̮̩̣̮͖̟̳̞̹͚̭͖̜͚̻̺͈̱̫̬͓̹̼̣͔̝̲̥͉̖̯͙̹̝̪̫̬͙̠͖͖̯̖͈͔̩̦͚͈̯͔͙̘̥̼̦̱̭͔̪̫̹̥͓̱̟̭͔̜̩̤̪̺̙͖̫̙͎̰̣͈̘̤̞͎̤̣̗̞̹̘̠̦̞̖͚̯͚̹̤̳̻̫̥̩͈̬͎͖͕̦͓̥̮͇̰̥̠̦̱̥̱̪̬̗̺͉͉͕̥̟̫̟̯̘͔͕̻̮̗̖͕̝̼̼̪͓̻̱̲̖̟̭͎͖̘͚̳͖͎͉̦̟̻̦̫̫̖̠̰̭͓͎̱̖͙̬̑̾̓͋̎͊̅́̈́̈́̽̑̋̀̂̇̓̀́̀̑́͆̽͛̐̒͗͐͆͌̔̈͆͐̊͊͛̌͐͛́̋́̈́̈̎̃͒́̎̄̌͛͒̉̿͆̈͂̉͛̊̆̋̒̄̿͌̈́̃̊͂̅̊͗̎̾͐̀͛͂́̾̄̆̿́͒̐̓̔̈́̏̄̈́̿̈́̀̊̓̓͌̓̈́̆͒̊̑̓̿̄́̀̇̇̓̎͆̽̎̾̊̌͆̒͆̈́̌̐͌̍̾̆͌͂̄̑̃͋͋͑͛̌̋͗̇̈̊̈́̿̇͂́͛̀̒͊̋͐̿͒̈́̿̇̀̐́͆̽͑̈́͌̄̀̑̊̀̆̽́̐̏͗̊̉̃̈̈́̇͗͗͋̃͂̋͂̽͌̍̀͂͌̈́͆̈́̈̒̏̅̂̾͊͆̆͛͊̌̆̐̿̐͋̽̍̇̒̅͊̍̾̇́̒̊̏͂͂͋̋̋͐̏͆̀̅̽̌̔͐̃͋̅̓͛̓̿̃̇́̃́̀͒̽͂̈́̎̎̇̊̀̉̂͆͛͐͂͌̍͆̈́͊͒͊͗͂̒̃̾̿̈́͂͑̒͆́̊̓́̌̇͒̅̀̓̃͛̒̑̌͊̊̃͆̅̎̈́̊͒̎͊̓̏̄̄̐̅̑̈́̇̑̌̈́̆̿́̎͗̋́̅͆̂̔̄̓̑̌̅͒́̽̃͗̏͛̋̓̊̈́́͊͛́̌̈́̂̔̂̿̀͐̔̂̌̓̊̉̾̓̽͐̒͗͊̄͑̄̈͗̍̿̃͂̍̎̎̀̒͑̍̅͌͐̊̿͒̿̑̏̀͗͗̈́̄̾̐̒͗̂̍̈́̅̑͗͊̾́͂̐̈́̀̀̅̒͐̀̒̅͌̍̍͐̀̂̏́̓͑̐͆̀͒̊͆͒̀̀̃̄̀̈̈́̀̎̉̃̋̏̆̾̍̚̚̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕̚͘̚̕͘̚̕͘̚̕̚̕̕̚̕͘̕̚̚̚̚̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅa̶̵̴̵̴̴̶̷̷̵̸̴̷̷̶̷̶̶̡̨̢̡̨̨̨̨̡̢̡̢̡̨̨̢̡̡̢̧̢̧̡̧̢̨̡̧̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛͙͕̺̻̘̠̺̖͉͉̦̞̦̻͈̺͈͉̣͎͖̩̦̪̙͖̮͎͓̺͇̪̮͍̻̦̩̻̱̝̮̳͖͕̖͎̦̘̦̯̜͈̘̭͔̘̩̤̟͔͈̜͓̳̩͇̩̰̙͍̘̜̗͔̩̖̯̦͚̗̬̯͕͖̞̤̺͖̪̖̬̱̼̫͎͎̰͎̩̲̱̞̦̖͙̦̰͙̝͖͚̣͕̖͔͔̞̬̤͈͎̜̲͈͉͈̹̪̼͇͍͙̰̙̳̲̗̤͖͍͇̲͖͚̯̰͖̘̮̻̯͈̖͙̥̬̻͔̭̬̮͈͉̰̜̯̟̥͖̤͈̦̩̥͚̹̙̮͕̙̥̜͓̩̣͈̥͙͉͙̬͍̯̳̳̤̣͚̼̼̱̞͈̖̰̭͎̱͎̻͚̣̤̬̟̺͉̪̥̥̮̪̻͚̠̺̟̭͓͖͉̭̟̙̭̻̝̬̥͙͈̭̤̟̬̪̠̞̲͇͚̹̪̜̖͔̻̤̩͓̝͖̖̺͔̫͍̘͉̫͓̲͍̩̘̘͔̹̰̖̺̪̫̝̺̲̻͔̻̙̹̥͍͉̜̳̹̯͍̻͎̜̹̝͍̝͚̣̮̩͙̜̱̟̤͚͎͈̹̹̙̣̲͎̣̳̦͎̲̙͚̖̱̻̩̣̥̠̗̯̞̳̗̯͚͈͖̜͕̻̻͈̘̗̠̻̮͕̫̱̱̠̹̯͎̘̼̺͉̘͖̭͕̪̠͔̭̯̘̲͖͎̻̩̱̩͚͙̯̠̳̣̼̥̯̟̭͓͔̘̪̰̫̦̥̼̽͛̽̾͋̒̃̊͛̿̉̍̇͌͋̈͂͋͋̑́͐͂̆͐͗͗̑̊͂̅̈́͌̊́͗͛̄̀́̈́̒̀̐̇̊́̏̍̉̍́̉̇̉͛͋̄͑̒̍̏͊̋̏̍̌̓͂̂̾̅̌͐̊̎̈́̃̅͋̔̾̎́̈́̈́͐̈́̔̆̏̈́̈͆̈́̈́̎̂̉́̈́̆̏̿̀̏͊͊͛̏͆́̂̆̐̐̀͐́̒̅̄̓͐̃́̾͒̿͂̒͗̂̀͌̉̅̎̍̂͗̒͐͌̓̔̍͗́̾̓̀̒̃͊̌̽͂̍̓̓̿͆̉̀̔͆̎̽̈̊̏͋͒͐͑͒͛͌̔͋͆̆̒̉͑̈́̽̑͋̃́̊̐̃̈̽̏̔͛̀̏̈͋͂́̅̋̀͌̆̄͛͒̒̀̌̽̃͂̀̃̀͐̃̆̇̂̋̑͋̍͐͂͒̍̐͑͒͌͋̒͗̂̓̊̒̂̾̎̾͋̊͋̀͑͆̀̎͊̈́͊̎̏̾̎͋̐͑͒̋̈́͛̅̂̌̊̍͗̂͂̇̉͆̉̔̒̈́͌̀̈́̀̌̅̓̀̀̅̉̂̿̎̌̋̿̅̈̓͊̍̂̿̚̚̚̚̕͘͘͘̕̕̚͘͘̕͘̚̕̕̕̚̕̚̚̚͘̚̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̸̵̵̴̵̶̵̴̸̵̸̷̸̷̴̶̴̷̷̴̶̶̡̧̢̧̢̢̧̨̢̨̢̡̢̢̧̨̧̡̢̨̡̨̡̡̧̢̨̡̨̢̨̧̡̢̡̢̨̡̢̢̨̧̨̡̢̢̡̡̡̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̹̜͚͎̩̹͍̪̖̰̱̳̘̘̤̩͈͉̜̲̞̜͙̜̪̼̗͙̟̥̥̣͍̙͓̥̯̤̫̗̘̪̺̰̦̣͎̤͚̰̰̰̺͚̦̥͙̘̺̪̞̰̞͍̩͎͙͎͈̳͙͎͕̝̥̲͕̯̩͔̪̜̙͙̦͉͈̥͔̤̥͉̝̘̜̪͍͙̯̜͉̟̰͓̟̭̥̫̲̺̭̝̘̣̥͉̪̟͇͙̼̹̫̖͉̘̲̬̱̖̲͙̜͓̟̖̳͇͔̣̻̞̖̗͖̯͕͓̥͇͉̰̙̤̫̲̥̞̦̬̘͖͙̗͍̪̩͉̳̳͇̫̺͙̫̥̻͔͔̠̙̰͖̭͖̠̩͍̰̭͖̣̲̜̻̱̘͕͈͍̖͕̭̲͈̪̝̖͚̗̖̻̤͖̺̗̯̗̺̲͇͚̙͈̫͍̫̗͇̝͚̙͇͎̮̣̩͍̮̠̪̪̘͔̼͎͍̝̠͇̩͇͚̰͈͉̳͕̪̖̲̟̥͇̖̫͕̺͙̟̘̫͖̣̫̤̳̝̥͚̠̥̮̻̝̣̩͖̠̙̭͕̙̪̳̜͕̱͈̜̫͕̜͖̗̻̩̳͓͉̺̥͓̬̦̳͔̞͇̱͇̠̥̩͍̻̬̱̩̱͉͖̻̥͍͔̟̺̟̟͚͔̘̰̪͖̝͕͕̦̮͙͎͇͍̮̖̠̟̩̖͍̭̠̮͈̣̮͓̱̤̗͍̩̤̙͕͙̤̳̟͈̯̞̲͇͍͉̮̲̭̬̯̯̖̘̭̞͙̦͙̩̭͇̟̥͚̞̲̟̻̦̜̪͙̠̯̻̪̞̝̙͈̥̠̳̰̹͚͖̱̳̲̼̝͇͙͓͇̭̺̤͕̝͔̯̦̼͔̙̗̻̺̝̫̬̱͉̖͖͓̤̞̝͖̜͙̙͖̭̳̘̭̰̦̖͇̦̯̳͉̙͙̰̰͚͓̘̩̣̯͈͇̟̬̲̠̺͍̖͉̮̮̩͉̬̘͚͚̼̻̻́̈́́́̔̍̈̀͌̈́̾̽́͋͒͛̓͛͗̈̒̂̈́̓̽̒̊̀̒̈͐̿̿͊̃͋͆͆̈́̑͌͑́̍̃͒͒́̽͒̈́̃͆̄̑̈̊̋̇͌̇̃͑̿̂̀́̀͒͗͋̽̈́̂̑͒͛̓̐́̊̅͊̔͒̋͊̀̌̋̏̇̈́͛̓̋̓̂͊͌͒̾̆̎̇͒̀̓̈́̓̄̂̿̋͑́̎̂͐̔̔̿͛̿̐̋̉̈̂̀̓̀̇̋͒̆͐̑̏̋̐̀̈̔̈́̄̽͗́̋́͌̈́́̎̾́̀͆͋̃̽̈̉͊̅̓̃̋͛̈́̀̈́̈́͆̓̈͊͆̊͂̀̄͊̈͐̎̊̽̓͋̓̎̇̈́́̔́̃́͆̇̈̎̀̆̓́̂̈́̀̇̔̾͊̈́͒͒̅͌̅̀͑̀̊̈́̉̍̄̅̀̊̀̏̏̏̔̾̽̌̀̒͋̾͌̐̎̌̐͋̈́̎͒̔̾̔̈́̃̽̃̏̔̉̓̇̋̀́̐͑̅͆͐͗͆́͒̈́̍̽͐̀̉͆̀̎̑̀̎͌̂̈́̂̓͌͋́̅̆̆̾̇̐̃̑̽͂͆̏̑́́̊̃͗͐̈́̔͆͛͋͊͌̌̌̈́͌̒̆̈͌͐̇̃̽̊͆̆̋̊̉͂̐̌́̔̇̊̈́͒͌̿͆̾̎̂̒̂̒̈́̽̃̀̊̄́̓͌̾́̑̂̐̆̋͂̀̒̒͑̊̉̒̉̇̅̂̽̎̊̐̑̿̈́͂̉̓̓̅͗̔̆͂̐̒̈́͌̋̇͊̋͑͋̓͌̏̍̍̿͒̾̒̔̈́̓̃͋͐͂̓͗̐͛̈́̑̒̍̋̐͒͛͒̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕͘̕͘͘͘̚̕̚̕͘̚̚͘̕̚̚̕͘̕̕̚̚͘̚͘̚͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅṃ̸̴̴̵̴̵̵̶̸̶̶̶̷̵̶̶̡̨̡̢̨̧̨̧̡̧̨̢̨̨̡̢̨̧̢̢̧̨̧̡̨̨̧̢̨̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̩͚͙̙̯̗͈̫̫͖͖̦͍̗͉͈̤̟̗͕̳̮͈͇͎̗̬̤̻̹̼̞̯̝̠͔͙̤̠̠͇͕̣͖͎͓̖̯̝͚̮̲̻͈̦̭̱͖̱͈͙̙̝̳̲̝̦͖̣̫̪͖̖̪̣̙͖͍̝̫̫͚͇̳̲̖̗̱͖͎̖̯̝̱̥̠̩̩͖̠̖͉̟̰̼̝͎͍̰͕͈̰̳͙̦̱͓̰̣̘͈̰͔̬̻͎̖̝͕͇͔̰̩̟̮͇̩̪̺̮̟̼̺̟̥͍̘̘̙͍̥͕̩̖̤̜͈̮̳͇͎͓̫̩̻̜̲͈̖͈̘͓͔̖̭͍̬͚̮̬̮̻̖̦̭̪͚͉̙͚̦̗̩̙̥̣͇̬̞̦̞̲̪̜̯̠̟͍͙̬̜̞̭͇͈̻̪̤̱̜̯̟̲̘̪̰̮̟͙̘̟̖̗̘͇̥̳͖͔̮̗̺̣̖͔̤͖̗̰̪͈̦̱̤̮̼̦̥̗̘̼̗̯̠͉̩̠̦͓̗̟̬̼͇̤̭̩̺͎̞̻̟̳̱͉̳̰̰̤̫̖͚͎̯͉͕̭͙̯̖̫̫̰̖̲̣͔̣͎͕̖̪̙͕̘̲̗̞̥͚̟͙̣̤͔̭͖͈̗̰͙͕͍̖͖̬͔̞̤̟̬̜̼̅͂̐̆̀̓̈́͒͂̈́̐̃̆̆̐̈́̓̑̏̃̎͛͊͆̈̑͗͒͋̾͐̆̀͐̌̐̊̈́̾̅̍͂̿̒̔̽̔͆̈͊̋͗̍́̏̑͌͑̔̈̿̒̈͛̋̍̄̈́͛̽̋̀͛͋͗̊̎̈́̒̂̆̊̎̄̐̆̊́̅̌̿̎͐̒̃̎̌̅̓͗͋͌̓̈́̀̆̓̌̎̓́͛́͊̽̇̈́͐̅͋̈́̉̇̓̈͐̐͊̿̎͗̽̄̋̄̾̆̋̈́͗͂̋̋͗̈́͊́̾͌̐̔͐̅̔̅͒́̈́͂̔͋̏͐̋̿͗͐̿͐̾̽͑̾̈́̐͒̀̈͋͛̑̽̽̊̆̍̊̾̏͂͌̌̄͑͊̑̐̉̒̾̋̑̒̌́̑͛̑̅̈́̇̏̑͑̏̅̄̿̎̅̀̈́́́́̃̓̈́̽̈́̓̉̒̍͆̏̾̾̆͆̋͗̒̌́̅̓̈͛̿͆̔̃̀͌͆̑͛̈́̐̆͋̇̄̏̂̇̐̈́̏̓͛́̃̐͑̿̔͗̈́͛͆͑̓̃̿̽̄͊́̃̒̈́́͑͊̌͆͐́̒̃͂͊̈́́͐̀̀͐̃̊̄̐̈́̐̊͊͛͛͗̑́̈̈́̒̃̒̍̌̓͆̀̆̆̐̑̒͊̀̾̂̍̆́͆͋̀̈́̈́̅͑̾͑̈́̌̆̈́̂̓̇̆̄͛̆͐̿̚͘̕͘̕̚̚̕̕̕̕͘̚͘͘̚̚̚̚̕̚̚̚͘͘̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̴̸̵̶̷̵̵̶̶̷̸̶̵̶̵̸̶̸̡̨̨̢̨̡̨̧̢̢̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛͈̯̩̲̜͔̻̺̻͈̦̭̹͙̞͍̟̲͇̥͉͙̼̜̭͇͕̺̬̫̣̙̪͔͖̖̤̤̼̱͇̣͚͔̘͉̬̬͖͓̜̱̖̬͈̞͔̫̖̤̹̱̯̦̲͉̜̥̜̼̻͔̥̥͈̺̣͚̹̰̮̤̠̜̱̞̠͚̻̞̼͔̳̞͍͕̟̣̘͙̩̣͕̻̺̥͈͚͚̙̻̲̭̭̜̹͚̣̯͙̹͉̙͚͈͇̻̘͕͙̟̫̼̹͍̩̯̳̜̭̦̝͚͕̲͔̝̝̘͙̠̲͎̙̜̭̬̥̠̹̻̥̗̼̤͇̘̘͕̦̟͕̼̠̝̯̞̫̰͓̬̗͉̪̗̥̺̥̦̥̭͚̳̜̺̖̪̤̲̤͍̪͇̳͙͕̞̥͓̱͈̦̰͈̻͇̩̳̞̙̦͎̞͙͈̭̼̬͙̱̘̘̹̙̥͈͖̗̳̬̞̺̦͛̅͋̓̌͛͋͐̇͊̿̓̇̃͗͑̍̈́̇͑̌͒͗͌͋̍͊̀̎͗̾̃̆̑̾̑͗͆̆͂͗̀͂̾̓̍͛͋̅̐͐̍̐͌͆̑͛̋̏̆̾̔̉̄͆̏͗̑̔̽͒͆̇̈́̽͛͋́̎̅̉̎̽̋̿̾͒͂̾͑̉̅̀̍̎͐͒̂͊̅̆̒̈́̅͆̇̇̂͗̏̓́͆̑̃͗̈́̍̍̅̏̑̉̒͌̽͛̉͒̇̈͋̈́̊̄͂̋̈́̑͋̾͊͊̋̊͑̂̆̈̈́̀̆̈̎̔͛̈̅͂̍͌͊̊̈́̐͐̆͌͊͑͋̔̇́̿͌̐͌̊̈́̎͆̋͛͂̀̀͂̅͌̇̿͋̑̓̎̈́̄͊͆̊̔̎͛̽͒̂̈́̐̀̾͒̀̈́͋̄͐̊̌́̾͌͊͒̔́̓̍͐́̈́̐̐̀̐̌̀͐̈́́͊̾́̍͘͘̚̕̚̚̕͘̚̕͘̕̚͘͘͘͘̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͠͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ?̶̶̶̴̸̷̵̵̶̸̴̶̸̴̶̴̵̴̵̸̸̴̴̶̵̸̷̸̷̢̡̢̨̡̨̧̨̧̢̨̡̨̡̢̧̨̢̢̧̧̢̧̢̨̢̢̧̡̧̨̧̧̢̧̨̡̧̨̢̢̧̨̢̡̨̡̧̢̡̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̙͚͖̜̺͎̱̳͙̯̖̲͈̳̟̹̥̻̯̱̜̰̝̱̱̦̜͖̟͉͚̗̹͕͇̳̟̲̞̝̭̮͍̥̝̝̞̗̙̤̯̱̻͍͚͇̠̙̟͎͈͔͇͉̼̳͉̥̮͎̙͉͎̗̲͓̜͔͓̲̟͈̩̞̼̺̺̥̝̖͍̞̜̤̲̭̜͙̘̦̪͇͖̤̩̫̼̦͖̲̩͓͈̖̥̲̝̟̠̯̹͍̱̣̤̮̳͉̜̥̝̲͎̦̰̬͈̹̳̜̣̟̙̲̱͉̮͓̱̺̮̰͍̪͉̫͔̘̤͚̝̘̱͇̟̳͉̞̮̲͙͇͕̖̯̣̰̳̣̖̯͙͉̮̙͚̦̜̼̫̲͈̗̼̼̤̭̣̫̻̻̫̭͇̹̹̣̲͓͍̭̮̰͎̤̣̲̻͙͈͇̬͙̰͕̲̣̼̬͈̭̦͙̦̝͔͔̗̯͖͙͖̤͉̺̯̗̩͇͍̼̦̞͔̻̼̫̱̭̯̩̥͎͎͓̼̙̦̟̹͎̥̺͕͔̠̥̗̭̻̭̖͚͕͔͕̦̦̖̯̜͖͚̘̠͓̣̥̩̞̪͇̮̲͖͓̜̬̻͓̳̠̥̤̘͙͇̜͖̺͕̭̖̤̳̟̳͉̣̣̣̼̗̖͎̣͓̳̝̙̝̭̲͎̝̹̻̘̙̳̤͍̲̘̹̻̪̺̪͉̤̠̬̯͕̘̦͇̺̼͎̦͎̺̙̭̬̳̠̝̜̺͓̯̣͇͍̦̙̮̰̞̩̼̦̻̻͈͔̣̬̬̻̝̹̼̘͈̦̥̠̲̘̭̺̭̺̥̤̪̠̣̫͓̻̫̰̖̬͎̗̰͕̘̣̗̮̻̣̺̯̝̺͍̹͓͍̩͓̹͓̲̺̙͕̙̻̼͈̞̩̼̝̟͇̙̣̫̠̪̟̻̻̱͚̥͍̭̜̠̺̮̟̥͉̫͕̹͈͈̹͍̗͈̰̯̲̥̰̠͚̤̠̜͎̳̘̲̞̼̙̗̟̖̥̠̗̰̖̮̥̼̤̺̻̜͍̠͎̳̫̳͚̟͎̬͈̳̹̯̻̰̫̫̥͎̳̩̙͉̩͕̟̟̙͚̠̭̞̪̭͔͙̻̘̯̲͔̫͚̼̭̹̳͕̙̥̹̩͇̗̟̳͔̰̟͈̫͓̘̳̼̳̪͔͎̮͎̮͈͚͍̖͈̉́̀̈́́́̅͆͊̏̄̐̊̊̀̀̈̉̍̃̿̐͐̀́͐̈́͋̋̽͌̽̇́̍̂̅͒̓͐̀͒̂̾̓͒̂̾́͋͒̆̈́͗͌̃̋̈́͐̈́̂̈́͒̆͛̐̽̌̍̀̾̑͋̂̐̽̽͆̎̋͒̽̈́̈͊̅̌̆͒̆̍̂̈́̐͛̀̌́̊͋͂̀͒̍̀̎̈́͂͒̇̽́̋̇́̌̊͋͒̊̒͊͂̈̌̓̋͌͊̀͂̇͊͛͌̈́̄̀̿̏̎̆́̉̄͒̑̽́̊̅̅̂̐̏́͊̔̇̓̓͂̔̈́̾͐̓̌̀̃̀̓̎̾̀͒̓̏͂͂̂̽͊̐̔͋̉̃͆̍̓͋̈̒̈͌̊̽̽̇̀̄͂͒̔̈͗͂͗̎͛̐̏̔͗̀̒͌̉̎̂̂͂̓̾́͂̀̆̑̍̾̍͒̔͋̎͗̒̈́͆͋̐̐̑͛̂͛̒̉̄͐̂̾̿̒́͒̒̾̀̄̀̌̅̐̓́́͆͑͑̃̋͒͌̾̊̎̽́̇̽̍̒̈́̍̄͑͆͋͆̿̂̾͆͑͊̿̂́̈́̑͐̑͆̀̽̿͒͐̐̀́̐̌͌̈́̿̆͆̇́̑̐̒̈́̓̏͊̈̈̍̾̅͆̑̇͑̂͆͛͊̈́̆̏͒́̂̍̄̃̍̀̊̏̌̽́̆̌̌̒̅͊͑̅̈́̎̋̉͊̇͋̈̔̅̑̉̈͒͛̂͌̈͐̌̏̀̑̆̏̀́̅̍̒͗͑͒̆̈̍́̍͐̆̄̽̎̉͌͊̒͋͑̽̂̔̃̀̅̒̊͌̊̽͊̑̄͌́̾̅̓͗́̈́͗̃͋̈́̄̒̍̌͆̈́̀̉͐̂̑̿͗̀̋̐͑̔̀̉̌̊̆͒̋̇̇̈̀̾̾͒͊̾̓̅̏̂̅̈́͛̎͆̅͂͑̉̆̾̓́̈́̎̒͑̊̔̌̋͂̍̔̋͒́̄́̓̅̎̊̃̌́̽͑̃̾͋͛̇̾̔̎̈́͛̄̑́̌̀̈́̉̒̇̇́̀̇̓̀͛̅̂̃͐̈́̇̋̈́͋̉̀̓͋͆͌͑͌̌́̈́̒̑̔̀̉̒̓̐̇̇́͐̿́̽͒̑̓͛̒̒͆̒̉̾̔̂̌̏̀͂̉̂̐͛̋͗̈́̃͗̐̕̕͘̕͘̚̕͘̕̚̕̚̚̚̕̕͘̕̚̕̕̚͘̕͘̚̚̕̚̕̚̕̚̚̕͘͘̚̚͘͘͘͘͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̷̵̢̨̨̡̛̹̞̝͈͙̩͈̟̘̯̦̳̭̰͇̲̳̩͇̲͔͚̗̙̬̯͚̝̩͉̖͇̜̬̞͚̯̩̼̥̫̯̹̩̩̳̮̞̳̖̞̜̰̯̼͎͉̮̭͂͌͐̎̔̾̈̐͋͆͗͛̋̀͛̊͐͑̍͒̐͜͜͜͝͝ͅͅͅẇ̸̷̴̶̵̷̷̴̴̵̶̶̶̵̵̷̴̴̴̷̸̶̴̶̷̸̷̷̷̶̸̸̡̧̢̡̧̧̨̢̡̨̨̢̨̧̢̧̢̧̧̢̡̧̡̢̢̡̨̡̨̡̡̧̡̧̨̧̢̡̧̧̢̡̧̨̡̧̡̧̢̨̧̧̡̧̧̧̡̨̢̢̡̢̢̢̧̡̢̢̡̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̪͎̱̳̰͇̺̝͔̩̲͍͙̤̗̰̻͍͍̟̻̺̣̘̪͚͖͇̣͇̤̗̞̜̜̫͙͎̜̠̪̘̺̪̺̫͓̙͔̙̤̫̖͓͉̘̯̦͔̞͚̰͍̗͎͚̥̹͈̰̞̟̘̟͖͙̤͇̺͕̜͖̱͇̥̦͇̝͖͕͎̝̪͙̲͕͔̺̪͙͖̣͚͈͕̟̰͍̜͔͔̝̖̮̟̹͉̼̬̟̲̖̼̘͈̞̟̣̖͕͎̱̫̫̞̣̳̞̹̩̩͈͙̩̺̯̳͇̙̦̠̣̬͇͎̹̹̪̝̦̼͎̯̩̲̞͍̟͓͕͇̱͎̞̞̻̺̩̮͈̼̱̺̭̭͚͖͖͖̣̟͇͚̫͇̹̖͈̥̤̗̲̬̖̺̝͔͚͎̼̪̬̞͇͇͓̪͇͖̫̯͕̭͕̤̞͚͈̻̠͔̬̞̫̣͓̟̮̙͉͔̬̞̠͚͇͈̙͕̦̻͍̩͈̙͔͍̙̰̲̫̗̬̮̜̼̦̮͎̫̼̻̹̯̯̝̗͔͍̻̬̤̼̪͍̺̩̯̪͓̰̤̳̪̻̫͓͓͙͎̥̬̲͇̯̞̺̼͚̝͇̣̯̠̝͉̤̹͈̘͙̱̟͉͎̩̭͇̙͍̬͎̠͖͍̭̝̻͎͓̜̩͎̩̙̩͈̫̗͕̝̩̮̙͕͚̝͙̫̞͕̭͈̖̲͚̗̤͕̺̼͈͇̼̫͚̫̟͈̰̪͈͈̺̤͎̙͓̗̟̳̖̤̫͔͈͈̼̮̰̩̫̖̩̗̯̗̞̝̩͉̗̘̦̞̺̼̻̲̩͎̦̳͈̤͍̫̠̺̹͇̮͖̯͕͍̤̪̪͔͉̩̦͉̗͖͍͓̻̘͚͓̣̥͎̫̘̖̳̖̳͉̱̤͇͎̣̩̫̟̘̰͎͙̮͍̬̥̳̙̖͔̹̗̺͕̳͖̤̤͖̤͇̗̗̤̺͉̞̲̤̙̠̮̫̼̪͇͍̘̣̼̗̮̳̺͚̱͚͚̮̳̺̙͔̹̦̙̰̗͚̟͚͖̜̪͎̩̠͍̱̭͈͇͕̠̼̺̩͖̰̞͈̭̪̞̮̰̘̘͓͎͔̟̗̼̘̲̝͕͓̲͇̖̠̙͈͚͉͍̰̤̣͉͎͈̼͚̘̤̜̠̼̦̗̠͓͙͖̬̜̹̹͎̙̝̰̲̖̪͎̝͍̤̰͕̰͇̙̞̮̫͔̤̳̪̼̻̙̹̜͈̳̰̫̻̰̥͎͓̞̯̙̰͈͇͎͙͙̖̰̳̭͉͕̳͍̠̳͙̞̰̩̥͎̘̲̣̟̥̥̭͇͓̂͐́͆̈́̉̒̌̈́̋́̑͛̄̆̌̒̈́̉͋͑͆̂̊̍̄̄͆̇̓̒̽̍̋̈́̓̈́́̋̒̉̀͐̇̔̂̃̿̓͆̒̀̈́͑̽̈͊́̔̔̑̀̃̑̃̅͆̅͗̆̀͆̇̊̆̋͑͊̇̈́̇͛͗̂̈́̓́͗͌̃͛͛̍̎̓͗̓̈́͛̽̾̿̋͒̈́̈́̈́̈́̃͊͂̂̈͗̊̓̍̀̾͌̏̅́̅̈́͐̑̉͑͐̔͊̈̾̎̑̋͆͆̉̔̾̇̋̋̇̎̓̄̈́̋̓̎̃̍̅̋̈́̍̓̆́̿̽̄̌́̊̄̓̍̎̔̄̈́̈̀̇̅̑̾̊̎͊̐̔͂͑̑̓͆̂̀̐͐̆͆̄͛̌̒̉͒͑̀̎̊̊́̈́̄̊̎̋̌̈̇̈́̽̔̒̒̇̃̆̿̅̈̄̋͌͑̊͛̓̔̂̃̔̾̿̏͗͑͋̌̈́̓̋͐͑̓͑̀̏̆̓̋̀̉̅̍̍̀̉̾̅̈̽̓͛͑̂̑̍̍̿͑͛̂̀̆͆̆͂͐̅́̓̈́͊̈́̒͐̃̇͗͑͐͌̌͊͋̈́́́̌́̄̄̍̈͒̓͆͒͐͋̉̓͆̐́̾̿͂͗̍̑̀͋͂̓̂̾̾͊̈́̈́̉̒̂̅̿́̓̒̆̓͋̄̏̀̆̄́̔͒̀͌̾̐̈͛̓̌̉͒̇̐̉̆̐̂̈́̊̎̔͑̓̑̓̓̏̏͗͌̑͌̏̔̽͐͛͊̈́̈́̉̈́̃͂̈́͌̍̆́̄̈́̔͌́͐̊̓̾͌̿͛͋͂̾̑̓̎̎̀͊̈́͐͛͋͑̽̈̈́̈́̐̒̈́̌̽̀̈̌͋̈́̍̃̃̒̉̍̓̎͐̉̈́͗͗̀̓̾̒̄͊̈́̾̾̋̏̈́͆͆̀̏̏́̓̔͗́̈́̈́́͛̂̈́̀̽͊̓̈́̂̄͛̃̒̌̍͊̀͐̿̾̈́́̐̈̇̿̈́̾͊̎̏̿͆̉̉̊͋̇͒̒̽̍̇͂͊̓̀͗̄͗̅̽̿̈́̓̒̂̈͆͋̓̈̓̅̇̈́̐̈͂̉̇̓̀̈́̐͌̀͗̄̈́̀͗͌̈̐̐̽̽̌͂̓̀̅͒̏̓̓̾̎͑̀͆̑͐̒́͊́͆͐͐̏̾͋̌́͛̈́̋̇̐̔͂̆͐̓̆̆͂̑̽̔́̓̓͗̽̑̑͑̓̍̄̉͊͊̽͋͂͐͐̉̈͒̑̑͊̈͌́͒̑͆̔̅̀̐̌͆̎̕̕̕̚̕͘̚̚̚̕̚̚̚̕̕̕͘̚̚̚͘̕͘̕̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̕̕̚̕͘͘͘̕͘̕͘̚̚̚̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅą̸̴̷̸̵̸̴̶̵̷̡̧̧̨̧̨̨̡̧̨̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̫͕͕̪͚̮͕̲͖̞͈͔͚̫̻̙̠̠̩̩͖̣͙͙̗͕͓͎͉̜̣͔̱̲̫͙̤͙͈̹̭̩͕̼̪͈̪̩̺̝̼͎̤̤̥͚̘̺̩̺̰͕͈̤̗͓͉̟͔̖͕̣̞̳̭̦͓̟͍̤̩͖̭̙͎̳̺͕͇͕̼̩̦̲̪̺̼̲̩͖̘͉̣̳̱̹̱̟̪̥͇͍͇̣̼̠̬̪̭̮͙͓͕͎̫͚͖̙͉̇̆̓͂͐̏́̓̎̈͑́͛̆͆̑̎̀̀͛̈́̌̍̈́̇̈́̉̍̒̈̓̍́͗͛̊͛̾͊͒͑͊̑̒̉͒͆́̈̓̎̄̈́̉̏͑͛̂́̈́̄̑̑͑͋̅͗̎̈̊̈́́͂͆̑̅̏͌̈́̎͂̄́͒̔͆͒̌̒̉̽̑͋̽̓̊̄̔̃̄̎͒̑̀̽̈́͂̀͊̊̿̌̒̌̇̋̏͒̔̅̓͑̓̏̓̽͊̌͗̔̄̆̇̆͛̓͂̇͛̿̽̐̐͒͆̿̓̓̌̔̌̉̇͆͛̿̃͑́̀͗̔͘̚̕̕͘͘͘͘̚̕̚͜͝͝͝͝ͅͅ ̵̵̷̴̵̷̷̸̶̷̷̶̸̴̵̴̷̷̵̷̵̢̡̡̧̡̢̡̨̧̢̢̡̧̨̨̡̢̢̡̡̧̨̢̢̨̨̨̨̡̢̧̧̢̡̧̢̡̨̧̧̧̨̧̡̨̨̨̡̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̳̪̟͉̯̖͖̮̩͕̖̳̫͓͎̱͈͈͚̻͕͇̬̺̭̬̞͓͙̫̤̖͎͕͚̺̮̣͖͔̠͔̥̹̫͓̩̹̻͉̺̫̳̳̘͕̱͔̥͉̯͓̜̱̰̖͚̙̙͓͓͍͈͖̻̱̘͚͇̯̥̼̹͍̺̱͔͚̘̺͇̭̪̼͎̖̗̝̮̗̰̼̲͇̤̟̖̦̺̫̘̘̦̪̜̯͕̳̤̙̹͉̦̦͎̜̳͍̺͙̝̰̞̲͙͔̯͚͓̞̯͖̞̻̲͕͙̰̦̩̼̗͇̘̻̭̻̙̳̺̺̦̖̝̰͎̘͔͔̤̘̞̯͈͉̙͔͙̲͇̮̱̤̰̼̤̲͈͎͎̤̳͈͓̗͇̟͚͕̻̥͇͉͖̼̥̝̺̭̱̘̤̰̩̣̪̖̤̘̻̝̗͖͔̻̺̳̗̗̞͔̫̼̪͍̼̲̱̖̜̭͖̲͔̣̞̜͎̯̹̟̥͖̲̤̗͇̣̥͍͉̙̩̺̼̪͉̝̭̺̙̣̳̮̗̮̹͍̯͈̺̣̠̥̟̮͚͓͕̩̣̗̰͚͇̼̝̟͔͔̳͓̣̩̤̠̪̪̠̞̰̼̜̦̤̩̘̘̖͇̝̩͚̟̱͕̯̪̳̖͎̲̣̲͎͚̝̺͔̠̱̳̥̙͕͎͕͉̜̟̞̻̩̝̞̣͕̹͖̼̺͈͉͚̣͎̘̦̝̯͉͇̹͉̻̤̞͕̱͈͓̼̝͖̮͙̱̘̬̜̩͍͇͔̩̙̼̫̘̹͖̤͈̣͉̟̦̗̯͕̜̫̩̭̪̪͇̙̘͚͇̱̝̜̮̦̪̫͍̲̳͓͔̬̰͎̳̫͓͙͎̝͎̯̰̞̻̓͐̓̇̊̐͛̎̾̀̅̽̃̿̾͑̎̎̑͌̇̿̃̋͋͐̓̀̎̋͌̿̐̐̋͌̐̔̑̑̇͆̈́̏͂̅͑̑̔̐͑̓͌̄͗̆̊͆͊͆̂̔̾́͂̀̀̀̉́̂̾̆̌̉́̈́̏͒̅̑͒̓̌͌͗͌̃̈̀̂̊̔͗̈́́̌̐̇͗̃̈́̐͆͐͒̋́͒͌͆̉̌̒͗͗́͆͂̆̀̀̓̎͐̂̀͛̎̏̎͋̀̏͆̓̈̒̆͗͐͋͗͐̈̇̌̈͛̑͑̒̊͋̽͋̈́̂̒̿̏͂̃͂͂͌́̌̈́̎̿̅̈͊̈́̑̿̇̉̉̐͐͋͛̍̃͐̽̒̉̿́̓̊̑͂̉̒͌͛̅͋̐͊͋͂̿̃̋̽̓̒̐͋̃̀͒̆̌̐͂̈́̓̀̆͊̄̅̐̋̾͆͐̄͊͋͗͌͒̌͒̉̋̿͑͛̃͂́̇́̈́̃̇͋̌̎̎̌̈́̈̿̾̃͒͂̒͑͋̿̇̌̈́̃̌̈́̃̌̓̍̈̾̌͛̾͛͑̆͊́̅́̀̊͋̑̑̑̈́͛̈́̈́̑̀̂́͑̈́̓̓̀̓͂̒͌͛̾̿͐̀̿̏͂͌̑̈͆͊̂͌̾̾͛̐̀̓̌̿̒̊́͋͗͗̍̃̒͒̎͆͊̅͌̋̈̈̌͆͂̍̓̆̈́̏̂̉̓͂́̉̽͊̌͋̐̎̒̎̂́͆́͗̓͒̑͋̇̏͂̓̓̍̀͒̾̈̍̽͑̈́̇͊͋̽͌̑̔͂̃̊̓͆̽̀̏͛̅̑̃̈̑̓̈͐̋̉͑́̏̂̽͗͋̇́̌̓͋̀͐̏̌̌͌̒͑̈́̌̏̂̓̇̋̅̿́͛͒̈͛̄̀̊͛̍̆̿͗͂͌̄̾̕̕͘̚̚͘̕̕͘̕̚͘͘͘̚̚̚̕̚͘̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̚̕̚͘̕͘̕̕̕̚̕͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅw̶̸̸̵̸̴̵̵̷̸̷̸̷̴̵̶̴̴̶̡̡̨̢̡̡̢̧̨̢̢̨̡̨̢̨̢̢̨̧̧̢̨̡̧̨̡̧̢̨̨̧̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̗͈͙͙̲̱͉̟͍̞̦͇̤̗̯̱̟̠̯̖̙̲͇̹̞̱̜̬͖͖̮̘̝̱̜͇͔̖̘̬̫̝̜̱̠͖̘̰̞̲̭͔̹̥̦̰̼̠̗̲̻͉̞͔̣͇͇̥̲͎̙̙̟̜̜̠͎͇̝͎͎̱̟̯͔̗̯̺͉̜͙̠̰̰͚͓͕̱̥̼͙̦̞̜̦̟̳̭̜̞̲͎͎͈͔̦̬̰̻̺̣̱͖͔̜̘̺͍̬̳̜͖̹̩̹̫̻̤̯̪̣͎̠͈̤̞͙͉̫̜̺̟̘̫͉͙̗̜͍̩̤̥̖̼͚͔͖̯̺̫̤̻̮̣̟̱̫̬̙̯͈̥̞̻̪̤̻̠͕͔͔̭̫̙͉̗͓̮͍̰͍͖̩͍̖͚͔̠͉̟̱̪̝̗̬̗̫̞̙͚͍̳͎͍͕͇͉̱̯̤̪͍̼̥̰̹̲̯͓̞̩̣̬̮̹̙̠̼̲͚̘̫͖͔̫̩̼̤͖̰͚̹̳̬̦̝̬̦͇̬͉͔̦̬̣͎̩͚͓̪̦͈̜̗̫̯̪͉͙͉̗̣͍̘͔͙̘̱͍̼̘͚͎͔̝̻͇͍̱̝̟̜̠̥̗͇͉͍̠̖̤̲͉̘̲͙̼͚̰̤̼̭̬̻͇̺͚̬̪̭̖͉̘͎͍͖̘͖̫̙̩̝̗̘̬̺͎̳̺͍͙͈͍̦̥̋̾̅̒͆͋̂̿̈́̆̿͊͂́̎͗̒̽̉́̽̑̂̈͂̂̍̾͆͑͆̆͊̒̑́͌͆͊̆͐͂̓͒̍̊̂̃́̔̄̽͛͒͊̑̑͒͛͑̎̔̿̐̏̎́̌̈́̑̄̍̈́̌̍͑̿̓̿͊̑͑̌̈́̅̑̑͂͂̒̒̀̌̉͊͂̈̽̄̂͐̍͌͒̄̽̀̊͋̀̄̏̆̐̍͐̄̉̄͛͗̿̐̔̄͂͑̒́͐́̉̎̊̎̓͋́̈́̄̃͐͒̒̊̓̇̈̑̿͛͐̀̇͌͂̀̋̐̉̍͋̌̔͐̈́͐̒̅̾̽̊̐͐̍̔͑̌͊͒̈́̂͗̒̍̆͂͒͒̈́͐́̈́̌̀̆͂̈́̾̈́͆̒̓̌̾̊̌̈́̄̆̋̀̾͂̿̆̌̊̆͆̐̓͐̈̊́̒̎̈́͊̈́̃̑̎͐̾́̏̈́̓̊̾́͌͛̒̊̀̇͊̎̽͊̅̈̊̿̅̄̓̓̅̋̂͋͗̓͂͋̄̈́̔͆̈́͊̒̈́̎̀́̆̂̃͂̌̑͐͒͆̏̿͂̋͒̓͛̑͊͋̑̾̌̓͋̀̀͆͂͑̐͂̌͛̃̐͂̂̊̆́̉͑̅̆͐́̉̏͑̓̆̀̈̿̀͆́̎͋͗͊̒̿̌̈́͂̅̾͂͌͂͒́͌͒̅̾̑̋͆̿̿̄͗̏̅͊̇̋͋̍̋̆́́͒̀̏̾̐͐͊̾̎͛̑͆̓͊͂́̃͌̇̄͑͂̌̾̌͂̏̆͂̏́̚͘̚̚͘͘̚̚̕̕̕͘̕͘̚͘̕͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̶̨̨̡̛̛̬̭̳͉͔͔̱̗̬͎̦̤͖̗̫̉̃̿̏̽̈͛̓͛͐̾͆͌͗͐͊͊͐̇̄̆̽̈́́̓̄̑́̏̐̍̓͗̂̄̕͘͜͝͝ͅͅw̷̷̵̸̶̶̷̵̴̶̷̸̷̸̷̸̵̸̴̸̴̵̸̷̶̴̴̶̵̸̸̵̴̵̷̶̵̷̢̡̨̢̡̨̨̢̢̡̨̢̨̧̡̧̨̨̡̡̧̢̡̡̡̢̡̨̧̢̨̢̢̨̢̡̡̡̧̢̢̡̢̧̢̨̡̧̡̢̢̢̢̢̡̧̨̢̡̨̨̡̢̡̡̢̢̧̨̧̨̨̨̧̢̧̧̡̡̡̧̧̢̧̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̜͖̹̹̹̬̝̬̹̱͓̲͎̤̪̖͍̳̣̺̖͔̖͉̬̼̩̪͍̞̫̥̙͓̦̥̺̲͚̲̙̼̙̹̟̞̪͚̱̫̻͎͔̼̻͍͎̩̼̜̟͉̙̩̬͚̩̫̙͙͎͙̜̭̺̩͕͖̰̟͉͇͓̳̻̲̜̩̻̥͎̝̟͓̦̣̯̗̳̯͙͚̹͕̻̲̩͉̜̭̥̱̺̜̤̙̦̣͎̤͕̻̙͙̤̙͍͓̪͔͎̫͓͉̯̬̻͔̖̻͓̹̮͕̗̱͚̜̻̮͙̝̩͎͍̱̩̹̤̤̺͔͕̳͕͍͓͇̺̭͎̹͔͔̘͉̬̺̟͎̻̥͇̤̟͉͇̥̖̭̣̺̤̪͉̮̜̲̱̪̘͉̙̠̟̦̻͔̻̙̯͖̬̠͚̭̪̖̬̳̫̦̟͍͔͕̪̙͎̗̳͚̜̤͈̫̣̦͔̞͙̯̼̰̰̥̙̳͙̥̞̟͍̳̘̭̙͇͔̭͕͇͎͙̠̲̥̮͙̜̰̖̘̠̜̮̜̟̻̙̗̻̜͇̰̲̥̣͔̝̫̻̙̩̫͔͓͔̙̖̳̻̬͎͎̩̙̳̼̪̫͚͇͈̬̖͚̪̭̦͚̠̱̣̠̭͔̼̫̹̖̙̼͇͖̺͎͓̺̥͍̞̻̙̘̬̺̭̠͍̘̞͇̭̹̙̜̹̠̱̲̦̱͎̗̝̯̫̻̼͖̜̞̻͍͎̪̭̘̠̹̩̙̲̹̤̣̟̖̫̙̩̼̼̺̤͕̰̪̪̹̗̫̟̤͈̘͈͔̙̱͖̥̙̮͕̫͍̠̟͙͇̮͙̯̩͕͔̣̭̦͉͈͉̩̬̤̯̲̥̟̗̲̳͕͓͕͇͔̟̹͍̳͎͚̘̖̫̬͙̦͎̳̙̳̲̟̜̱̮̼̳̥͍͈̝̣̣̮͙̟̲̯̜̗̳̜͔͖̦̯̙̹͖̟͙͎̥͍̺͔̲̩̠͓̩͔̤͈̻͇̘̪̬̣̤̝͍͎͙̥͕̮̭̤͕̙͖͈̲̙̤̖̯͉͓͖̪̩͚̲̖͕͈̙̬͈̦̮̠̮̥͇̫̯̪̯̗̱̥̭̜͔̮͔̲͇͓̹͕͕͎͉̯̯̭̤͍͙̳̪͓͎̥̘̙͈̯̠̝̮͈̱̮̝̜̳͉̜̳̠̤̦̩͉̳̼͚͍̮͉̞̜̜͓̫͓͇̻̯͎̬̟̬̺̙̳̼̙̮̼͔̙̮̺̠̰̤̠̘̯̭͖̼̟͚̯̟͉̺̪͇̖̳̱̭̰̣̭̮̣͓̟̰̙̜̲͔̯͖͍͖̬̼͉͇̭͉͚̺̯̣͉̗̺̤̼̯̱͕͔̠̗͈̜̘̱̠̘̖̘̫̲̘͉̰̟̯̜̳͚̫̖͙̗̤̟̤̘̰̲̙̥͚͉̥̰͔͎̳̱̬̠̮̟̜̦̖̫͙̪̗̺̳͕̳̮͚̤̯̲̻̥̠̖̝̻̲̠͉̜͚͒́̾̾̇̎̈́̉̈́̈́͋̽̀̅̒̊̂̃̔̓̇͐̈́̅̽̅̿́̎̌͌̈́̒̽͆̾̽̾́̒͊͒͗͆̂̎́̓̆͆́́̎̽̈̈́͗̈́̏͂̃̊͆̄̎̍̊̑̀̔̅́̀̉̂͒̉͒̈́̏͂̅̐̓̈́͂̃́͐̀̔̍̇͒̏̇͆̾̍̀͛̽͗̊̋͋͊̇͗͐̓̽́̄͆̔͑́̀̂̂̿́̈̈́̑̊̔̓͛͊̉͛̉̑͊͊́̂͛͂͒̇͐̀̊͛̓̌̑̍̿̏̆̌̾̐̓͂̅̒̂̓̅̽̄̈́̅̆̍̂̐̈́̋͛̑͗̇̈́̓͑̈̏̇͂̓̍̈́̈̐̂̑͌͑͆̓̈́͊̑̊͒̇̆̉̈́̀͗̆͛̌̇͑̈́̒͋̌̑̿͆̑̒́̄͒͒̔̀͂̐̂̑͌̀͛͑͑́̇͌̉̇̎̽̏͑̔͋̓͒͌͋͆́̋͌͛̿̍̈́͋̽͋́̂͛̃̅̈̑̓́̓̔̑̽͆̔̋̀̿́̉̎̈́̐̐̅̓͗̈͆̽̃̎͌̆̈͊̄͒̈̾̽̉́́̈́̔̓̽̄̔͋̓̈́̏̔̓̉͊̾̈̓̔͋̏̌̏̀͒͗̎́̈́͛͒̌̄͐͋̒͊̑͑̌́̉͑̀͆͌̉̈̈́̈́̒̂̈́͂͑̐͊̌͌͋̉̎́̂͛͛̐̓̀̈͗̈͆͆͒̏̆͒̆̄͑̋̉̉͑̈́̆̆͌͑̀́͆̂̑́̓͂̍̑̌̃̌̓́̇̌́̑͊̓̔̌̈̓́͗̀̌̌̄̃͊̈͊͑̂̔͑̔̀͐̋̓̾̔̎̇̀͗̇͆͆̈̀̈́̋́̓̎̑̅̓͂̔̂͂͑͐̃͂̑̈́͌́̀̀̔̔̐̒̈̆̉͒̇̅͐̆̈́̾́̀̈́̈̓̃̌̈̉̃̉̇̒̀̀̌̾̃̆͛̈̔̂̈̀͋̏͑͛̄͊̊̾̀͆̊́͂͐̑̃̌̇͌̆̊̈́͊̃̇̏̒͑͊̅̉́͒͗̇̇̾͌̊̓̊͌̌͐̔̎̀͆̿̿̒̆́͂̅͋̔͐̍̋̀͋̊̈́̄̋̓̐͐͒̾̈́̎̈́̉̾̆́͛̇̔͛̿͛̅̃̑͗̇̏̾̋̿͌́́̒̈͗̌̈́͆̀̓̈͂̏̾̈́̽̿̀̈́̔͛̏̉̿͑̈̿͊̿̄͑͐͐̿̀̓̀̋̈́̈́̊̎̍̄̀̀̑̈́̿́̏̌̐̈́͑̏͋̓̑̓͑̇̍̋͛̂͐͋̐͑̓̊͗̂̆̉̈́͊̍̐́̔͐́͊͒̍͋͊̈͋͌̈́͑̂͛̏͆̽̉̅͗͗͂̉̿̂͐̔̍͌̆̃̄̀͐̈́̓̄̄̔̍̀̆̆̿̿̎͑̓̓̈́̉̇̋͒́̓͊̓̇͆̈́͗̑̑̈́͂̅̔͂͑͗̎͆͑̈́̆̄̉̄̒̿̇̀̍̉̓̿̃̈́̉̃͌̎̍̋̋̆̃̓̇̈́͊͌͌͛̀̓̔̾̂͛̓̽̍͛̐̅̔͗̓͛̾̑̔͒̋̾̑̑̍́͛̅́̎̐̀͆̿̈́͊́́̀̾́̄͑̀̓̓͊̄̔̏̾͆͋̄̈́̎̄̅̒͋̒̐̄́̌̓͂̀͐̑̈́̾̃̆̆̚̚̕͘̕͘̕̚̕̚͘̚̕̚͘͘̕͘̚͘̚͘̕͘͘̚̕͘̚͘̕̚̕̚̕̚̚͘̕͘̚̕͘͘̕͘̕̚̕̚̕̚͘̕̕̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̵̸̸̵̷̸̸̷̶̵̷̵̵̵̵̴̵̷̴̵̸̸̴̴̢̡̧̨̢̢̡̢̨̡̧̡̧̧̧̨̢̢̨̢̨̢̨̨̢̨̨̨̡̧̨̢̢̢̧̢̡̢̨̡̡̢̢̨̢̨̧̡̡̢̧̧̧̧̢̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̦̣̳͇̟͍̖̘̼̟͈̩̬͖̯͖̯̜̭̮͉̝̺̲̮͔͔̮̲̘̦̹̦̜̮̩̞͖̮̫̥̰̮̪͔̺̻͔͕͕̥̭̤̝͙͖̠̤̮̥͕̠͚̤̭̗͈̰̥͕̤͎̞͙̳̭̦̲͉̰͖̫̞̯̭̜̖͉̩̗̮̯̤̰͔͖̳̞̠̪̜̗̬͈̩̩̠̝̰̘͍͙̫͕͖̖̞̦̪͈̫͇̪̝͖̱̣̟̗̪̗͙͚̞͍̲͔̺̯̦̪͓̜̬͔͍͎̗̱̪͕̳͓͓̖̣̝͔̯̭̩͉̞͍̣̝̣̣̤͙̰͎̞̥̠͙͓̘̬͕̘͚͍͕̜̦̥̘̖̪̼͕͕̲̻̰̰͚̘̮̲̪̺̤̻͉̟͇̤̳͍͚͙͇̤̝̻̠̳̼̱͇͕̱̖͚̭͓͈̯̱͉̫̬͎͈̣̥̹̭͚̺̝̫̗͙̦̠̯̹͔̼͙̘͖̤̙͙͔̦̭̗̮̣̲̥̗͈̣͕̟̮̮̬̳̪̻̼̮̭͎̹̭͕̦̺̖̮̠̝̖͓̙̮̥̜̪̬̗͈̠̪̞͍̰̺͈̗̤͎̭̣̫̱̯͍̠͕̮̩̣̮͖̟̳̞̹͚̭͖̜͚̻̺͈̱̫̬͓̹̼̣͔̝̲̥͉̖̯͙̹̝̪̫̬͙̠͖͖̯̖͈͔̩̦͚͈̯͔͙̘̥̼̦̱̭͔̪̫̹̥͓̱̟̭͔̜̩̤̪̺̙͖̫̙͎̰̣͈̘̤̞͎̤̣̗̞̹̘̠̦̞̖͚̯͚̹̤̳̻̫̥̩͈̬͎͖͕̦͓̥̮͇̰̥̠̦̱̥̱̪̬̗̺͉͉͕̥̟̫̟̯̘͔͕̻̮̗̖͕̝̼̼̪͓̻̱̲̖̟̭͎͖̘͚̳͖͎͉̦̟̻̦̫̫̖̠̰̭͓͎̱̖͙̬̑̾̓͋̎͊̅́̈́̈́̽̑̋̀̂̇̓̀́̀̑́͆̽͛̐̒͗͐͆͌̔̈͆͐̊͊͛̌͐͛́̋́̈́̈̎̃͒́̎̄̌͛͒̉̿͆̈͂̉͛̊̆̋̒̄̿͌̈́̃̊͂̅̊͗̎̾͐̀͛͂́̾̄̆̿́͒̐̓̔̈́̏̄̈́̿̈́̀̊̓̓͌̓̈́̆͒̊̑̓̿̄́̀̇̇̓̎͆̽̎̾̊̌͆̒͆̈́̌̐͌̍̾̆͌͂̄̑̃͋͋͑͛̌̋͗̇̈̊̈́̿̇͂́͛̀̒͊̋͐̿͒̈́̿̇̀̐́͆̽͑̈́͌̄̀̑̊̀̆̽́̐̏͗̊̉̃̈̈́̇͗͗͋̃͂̋͂̽͌̍̀͂͌̈́͆̈́̈̒̏̅̂̾͊͆̆͛͊̌̆̐̿̐͋̽̍̇̒̅͊̍̾̇́̒̊̏͂͂͋̋̋͐̏͆̀̅̽̌̔͐̃͋̅̓͛̓̿̃̇́̃́̀͒̽͂̈́̎̎̇̊̀̉̂͆͛͐͂͌̍͆̈́͊͒͊͗͂̒̃̾̿̈́͂͑̒͆́̊̓́̌̇͒̅̀̓̃͛̒̑̌͊̊̃͆̅̎̈́̊͒̎͊̓̏̄̄̐̅̑̈́̇̑̌̈́̆̿́̎͗̋́̅͆̂̔̄̓̑̌̅͒́̽̃͗̏͛̋̓̊̈́́͊͛́̌̈́̂̔̂̿̀͐̔̂̌̓̊̉̾̓̽͐̒͗͊̄͑̄̈͗̍̿̃͂̍̎̎̀̒͑̍̅͌͐̊̿͒̿̑̏̀͗͗̈́̄̾̐̒͗̂̍̈́̅̑͗͊̾́͂̐̈́̀̀̅̒͐̀̒̅͌̍̍͐̀̂̏́̓͑̐͆̀͒̊͆͒̀̀̃̄̀̈̈́̀̎̉̃̋̏̆̾̍̚̚̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕̚͘̚̕͘̚̕͘̚̕̚̕̕̚̕͘̕̚̚̚̚̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅa̶̵̴̵̴̴̶̷̷̵̸̴̷̷̶̷̶̶̡̨̢̡̨̨̨̨̡̢̡̢̡̨̨̢̡̡̢̧̢̧̡̧̢̨̡̧̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛͙͕̺̻̘̠̺̖͉͉̦̞̦̻͈̺͈͉̣͎͖̩̦̪̙͖̮͎͓̺͇̪̮͍̻̦̩̻̱̝̮̳͖͕̖͎̦̘̦̯̜͈̘̭͔̘̩̤̟͔͈̜͓̳̩͇̩̰̙͍̘̜̗͔̩̖̯̦͚̗̬̯͕͖̞̤̺͖̪̖̬̱̼̫͎͎̰͎̩̲̱̞̦̖͙̦̰͙̝͖͚̣͕̖͔͔̞̬̤͈͎̜̲͈͉͈̹̪̼͇͍͙̰̙̳̲̗̤͖͍͇̲͖͚̯̰͖̘̮̻̯͈̖͙̥̬̻͔̭̬̮͈͉̰̜̯̟̥͖̤͈̦̩̥͚̹̙̮͕̙̥̜͓̩̣͈̥͙͉͙̬͍̯̳̳̤̣͚̼̼̱̞͈̖̰̭͎̱͎̻͚̣̤̬̟̺͉̪̥̥̮̪̻͚̠̺̟̭͓͖͉̭̟̙̭̻̝̬̥͙͈̭̤̟̬̪̠̞̲͇͚̹̪̜̖͔̻̤̩͓̝͖̖̺͔̫͍̘͉̫͓̲͍̩̘̘͔̹̰̖̺̪̫̝̺̲̻͔̻̙̹̥͍͉̜̳̹̯͍̻͎̜̹̝͍̝͚̣̮̩͙̜̱̟̤͚͎͈̹̹̙̣̲͎̣̳̦͎̲̙͚̖̱̻̩̣̥̠̗̯̞̳̗̯͚͈͖̜͕̻̻͈̘̗̠̻̮͕̫̱̱̠̹̯͎̘̼̺͉̘͖̭͕̪̠͔̭̯̘̲͖͎̻̩̱̩͚͙̯̠̳̣̼̥̯̟̭͓͔̘̪̰̫̦̥̼̽͛̽̾͋̒̃̊͛̿̉̍̇͌͋̈͂͋͋̑́͐͂̆͐͗͗̑̊͂̅̈́͌̊́͗͛̄̀́̈́̒̀̐̇̊́̏̍̉̍́̉̇̉͛͋̄͑̒̍̏͊̋̏̍̌̓͂̂̾̅̌͐̊̎̈́̃̅͋̔̾̎́̈́̈́͐̈́̔̆̏̈́̈͆̈́̈́̎̂̉́̈́̆̏̿̀̏͊͊͛̏͆́̂̆̐̐̀͐́̒̅̄̓͐̃́̾͒̿͂̒͗̂̀͌̉̅̎̍̂͗̒͐͌̓̔̍͗́̾̓̀̒̃͊̌̽͂̍̓̓̿͆̉̀̔͆̎̽̈̊̏͋͒͐͑͒͛͌̔͋͆̆̒̉͑̈́̽̑͋̃́̊̐̃̈̽̏̔͛̀̏̈͋͂́̅̋̀͌̆̄͛͒̒̀̌̽̃͂̀̃̀͐̃̆̇̂̋̑͋̍͐͂͒̍̐͑͒͌͋̒͗̂̓̊̒̂̾̎̾͋̊͋̀͑͆̀̎͊̈́͊̎̏̾̎͋̐͑͒̋̈́͛̅̂̌̊̍͗̂͂̇̉͆̉̔̒̈́͌̀̈́̀̌̅̓̀̀̅̉̂̿̎̌̋̿̅̈̓͊̍̂̿̚̚̚̚̕͘͘͘̕̕̚͘͘̕͘̚̕̕̕̚̕̚̚̚͘̚̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̸̵̵̴̵̶̵̴̸̵̸̷̸̷̴̶̴̷̷̴̶̶̡̧̢̧̢̢̧̨̢̨̢̡̢̢̧̨̧̡̢̨̡̨̡̡̧̢̨̡̨̢̨̧̡̢̡̢̨̡̢̢̨̧̨̡̢̢̡̡̡̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̹̜͚͎̩̹͍̪̖̰̱̳̘̘̤̩͈͉̜̲̞̜͙̜̪̼̗͙̟̥̥̣͍̙͓̥̯̤̫̗̘̪̺̰̦̣͎̤͚̰̰̰̺͚̦̥͙̘̺̪̞̰̞͍̩͎͙͎͈̳͙͎͕̝̥̲͕̯̩͔̪̜̙͙̦͉͈̥͔̤̥͉̝̘̜̪͍͙̯̜͉̟̰͓̟̭̥̫̲̺̭̝̘̣̥͉̪̟͇͙̼̹̫̖͉̘̲̬̱̖̲͙̜͓̟̖̳͇͔̣̻̞̖̗͖̯͕͓̥͇͉̰̙̤̫̲̥̞̦̬̘͖͙̗͍̪̩͉̳̳͇̫̺͙̫̥̻͔͔̠̙̰͖̭͖̠̩͍̰̭͖̣̲̜̻̱̘͕͈͍̖͕̭̲͈̪̝̖͚̗̖̻̤͖̺̗̯̗̺̲͇͚̙͈̫͍̫̗͇̝͚̙͇͎̮̣̩͍̮̠̪̪̘͔̼͎͍̝̠͇̩͇͚̰͈͉̳͕̪̖̲̟̥͇̖̫͕̺͙̟̘̫͖̣̫̤̳̝̥͚̠̥̮̻̝̣̩͖̠̙̭͕̙̪̳̜͕̱͈̜̫͕̜͖̗̻̩̳͓͉̺̥͓̬̦̳͔̞͇̱͇̠̥̩͍̻̬̱̩̱͉͖̻̥͍͔̟̺̟̟͚͔̘̰̪͖̝͕͕̦̮͙͎͇͍̮̖̠̟̩̖͍̭̠̮͈̣̮͓̱̤̗͍̩̤̙͕͙̤̳̟͈̯̞̲͇͍͉̮̲̭̬̯̯̖̘̭̞͙̦͙̩̭͇̟̥͚̞̲̟̻̦̜̪͙̠̯̻̪̞̝̙͈̥̠̳̰̹͚͖̱̳̲̼̝͇͙͓͇̭̺̤͕̝͔̯̦̼͔̙̗̻̺̝̫̬̱͉̖͖͓̤̞̝͖̜͙̙͖̭̳̘̭̰̦̖͇̦̯̳͉̙͙̰̰͚͓̘̩̣̯͈͇̟̬̲̠̺͍̖͉̮̮̩͉̬̘͚͚̼̻̻́̈́́́̔̍̈̀͌̈́̾̽́͋͒͛̓͛͗̈̒̂̈́̓̽̒̊̀̒̈͐̿̿͊̃͋͆͆̈́̑͌͑́̍̃͒͒́̽͒̈́̃͆̄̑̈̊̋̇͌̇̃͑̿̂̀́̀͒͗͋̽̈́̂̑͒͛̓̐́̊̅͊̔͒̋͊̀̌̋̏̇̈́͛̓̋̓̂͊͌͒̾̆̎̇͒̀̓̈́̓̄̂̿̋͑́̎̂͐̔̔̿͛̿̐̋̉̈̂̀̓̀̇̋͒̆͐̑̏̋̐̀̈̔̈́̄̽͗́̋́͌̈́́̎̾́̀͆͋̃̽̈̉͊̅̓̃̋͛̈́̀̈́̈́͆̓̈͊͆̊͂̀̄͊̈͐̎̊̽̓͋̓̎̇̈́́̔́̃́͆̇̈̎̀̆̓́̂̈́̀̇̔̾͊̈́͒͒̅͌̅̀͑̀̊̈́̉̍̄̅̀̊̀̏̏̏̔̾̽̌̀̒͋̾͌̐̎̌̐͋̈́̎͒̔̾̔̈́̃̽̃̏̔̉̓̇̋̀́̐͑̅͆͐͗͆́͒̈́̍̽͐̀̉͆̀̎̑̀̎͌̂̈́̂̓͌͋́̅̆̆̾̇̐̃̑̽͂͆̏̑́́̊̃͗͐̈́̔͆͛͋͊͌̌̌̈́͌̒̆̈͌͐̇̃̽̊͆̆̋̊̉͂̐̌́̔̇̊̈́͒͌̿͆̾̎̂̒̂̒̈́̽̃̀̊̄́̓͌̾́̑̂̐̆̋͂̀̒̒͑̊̉̒̉̇̅̂̽̎̊̐̑̿̈́͂̉̓̓̅͗̔̆͂̐̒̈́͌̋̇͊̋͑͋̓͌̏̍̍̿͒̾̒̔̈́̓̃͋͐͂̓͗̐͛̈́̑̒̍̋̐͒͛͒̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕͘̕͘͘͘̚̕̚̕͘̚̚͘̕̚̚̕͘̕̕̚̚͘̚͘̚͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅṃ̸̴̴̵̴̵̵̶̸̶̶̶̷̵̶̶̡̨̡̢̨̧̨̧̡̧̨̢̨̨̡̢̨̧̢̢̧̨̧̡̨̨̧̢̨̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̩͚͙̙̯̗͈̫̫͖͖̦͍̗͉͈̤̟̗͕̳̮͈͇͎̗̬̤̻̹̼̞̯̝̠͔͙̤̠̠͇͕̣͖͎͓̖̯̝͚̮̲̻͈̦̭̱͖̱͈͙̙̝̳̲̝̦͖̣̫̪͖̖̪̣̙͖͍̝̫̫͚͇̳̲̖̗̱͖͎̖̯̝̱̥̠̩̩͖̠̖͉̟̰̼̝͎͍̰͕͈̰̳͙̦̱͓̰̣̘͈̰͔̬̻͎̖̝͕͇͔̰̩̟̮͇̩̪̺̮̟̼̺̟̥͍̘̘̙͍̥͕̩̖̤̜͈̮̳͇͎͓̫̩̻̜̲͈̖͈̘͓͔̖̭͍̬͚̮̬̮̻̖̦̭̪͚͉̙͚̦̗̩̙̥̣͇̬̞̦̞̲̪̜̯̠̟͍͙̬̜̞̭͇͈̻̪̤̱̜̯̟̲̘̪̰̮̟͙̘̟̖̗̘͇̥̳͖͔̮̗̺̣̖͔̤͖̗̰̪͈̦̱̤̮̼̦̥̗̘̼̗̯̠͉̩̠̦͓̗̟̬̼͇̤̭̩̺͎̞̻̟̳̱͉̳̰̰̤̫̖͚͎̯͉͕̭͙̯̖̫̫̰̖̲̣͔̣͎͕̖̪̙͕̘̲̗̞̥͚̟͙̣̤͔̭͖͈̗̰͙͕͍̖͖̬͔̞̤̟̬̜̼̅͂̐̆̀̓̈́͒͂̈́̐̃̆̆̐̈́̓̑̏̃̎͛͊͆̈̑͗͒͋̾͐̆̀͐̌̐̊̈́̾̅̍͂̿̒̔̽̔͆̈͊̋͗̍́̏̑͌͑̔̈̿̒̈͛̋̍̄̈́͛̽̋̀͛͋͗̊̎̈́̒̂̆̊̎̄̐̆̊́̅̌̿̎͐̒̃̎̌̅̓͗͋͌̓̈́̀̆̓̌̎̓́͛́͊̽̇̈́͐̅͋̈́̉̇̓̈͐̐͊̿̎͗̽̄̋̄̾̆̋̈́͗͂̋̋͗̈́͊́̾͌̐̔͐̅̔̅͒́̈́͂̔͋̏͐̋̿͗͐̿͐̾̽͑̾̈́̐͒̀̈͋͛̑̽̽̊̆̍̊̾̏͂͌̌̄͑͊̑̐̉̒̾̋̑̒̌́̑͛̑̅̈́̇̏̑͑̏̅̄̿̎̅̀̈́́́́̃̓̈́̽̈́̓̉̒̍͆̏̾̾̆͆̋͗̒̌́̅̓̈͛̿͆̔̃̀͌͆̑͛̈́̐̆͋̇̄̏̂̇̐̈́̏̓͛́̃̐͑̿̔͗̈́͛͆͑̓̃̿̽̄͊́̃̒̈́́͑͊̌͆͐́̒̃͂͊̈́́͐̀̀͐̃̊̄̐̈́̐̊͊͛͛͗̑́̈̈́̒̃̒̍̌̓͆̀̆̆̐̑̒͊̀̾̂̍̆́͆͋̀̈́̈́̅͑̾͑̈́̌̆̈́̂̓̇̆̄͛̆͐̿̚͘̕͘̕̚̚̕̕̕̕͘̚͘͘̚̚̚̚̕̚̚̚͘͘̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̴̸̵̶̷̵̵̶̶̷̸̶̵̶̵̸̶̸̡̨̨̢̨̡̨̧̢̢̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛͈̯̩̲̜͔̻̺̻͈̦̭̹͙̞͍̟̲͇̥͉͙̼̜̭͇͕̺̬̫̣̙̪͔͖̖̤̤̼̱͇̣͚͔̘͉̬̬͖͓̜̱̖̬͈̞͔̫̖̤̹̱̯̦̲͉̜̥̜̼̻͔̥̥͈̺̣͚̹̰̮̤̠̜̱̞̠͚̻̞̼͔̳̞͍͕̟̣̘͙̩̣͕̻̺̥͈͚͚̙̻̲̭̭̜̹͚̣̯͙̹͉̙͚͈͇̻̘͕͙̟̫̼̹͍̩̯̳̜̭̦̝͚͕̲͔̝̝̘͙̠̲͎̙̜̭̬̥̠̹̻̥̗̼̤͇̘̘͕̦̟͕̼̠̝̯̞̫̰͓̬̗͉̪̗̥̺̥̦̥̭͚̳̜̺̖̪̤̲̤͍̪͇̳͙͕̞̥͓̱͈̦̰͈̻͇̩̳̞̙̦͎̞͙͈̭̼̬͙̱̘̘̹̙̥͈͖̗̳̬̞̺̦͛̅͋̓̌͛͋͐̇͊̿̓̇̃͗͑̍̈́̇͑̌͒͗͌͋̍͊̀̎͗̾̃̆̑̾̑͗͆̆͂͗̀͂̾̓̍͛͋̅̐͐̍̐͌͆̑͛̋̏̆̾̔̉̄͆̏͗̑̔̽͒͆̇̈́̽͛͋́̎̅̉̎̽̋̿̾͒͂̾͑̉̅̀̍̎͐͒̂͊̅̆̒̈́̅͆̇̇̂͗̏̓́͆̑̃͗̈́̍̍̅̏̑̉̒͌̽͛̉͒̇̈͋̈́̊̄͂̋̈́̑͋̾͊͊̋̊͑̂̆̈̈́̀̆̈̎̔͛̈̅͂̍͌͊̊̈́̐͐̆͌͊͑͋̔̇́̿͌̐͌̊̈́̎͆̋͛͂̀̀͂̅͌̇̿͋̑̓̎̈́̄͊͆̊̔̎͛̽͒̂̈́̐̀̾͒̀̈́͋̄͐̊̌́̾͌͊͒̔́̓̍͐́̈́̐̐̀̐̌̀͐̈́́͊̾́̍͘͘̚̕̚̚̕͘̚̕͘̕̚͘͘͘͘̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͠͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ?̶̶̶̴̸̷̵̵̶̸̴̶̸̴̶̴̵̴̵̸̸̴̴̶̵̸̷̸̷̢̡̢̨̡̨̧̨̧̢̨̡̨̡̢̧̨̢̢̧̧̢̧̢̨̢̢̧̡̧̨̧̧̢̧̨̡̧̨̢̢̧̨̢̡̨̡̧̢̡̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̙͚͖̜̺͎̱̳͙̯̖̲͈̳̟̹̥̻̯̱̜̰̝̱̱̦̜͖̟͉͚̗̹͕͇̳̟̲̞̝̭̮͍̥̝̝̞̗̙̤̯̱̻͍͚͇̠̙̟͎͈͔͇͉̼̳͉̥̮͎̙͉͎̗̲͓̜͔͓̲̟͈̩̞̼̺̺̥̝̖͍̞̜̤̲̭̜͙̘̦̪͇͖̤̩̫̼̦͖̲̩͓͈̖̥̲̝̟̠̯̹͍̱̣̤̮̳͉̜̥̝̲͎̦̰̬͈̹̳̜̣̟̙̲̱͉̮͓̱̺̮̰͍̪͉̫͔̘̤͚̝̘̱͇̟̳͉̞̮̲͙͇͕̖̯̣̰̳̣̖̯͙͉̮̙͚̦̜̼̫̲͈̗̼̼̤̭̣̫̻̻̫̭͇̹̹̣̲͓͍̭̮̰͎̤̣̲̻͙͈͇̬͙̰͕̲̣̼̬͈̭̦͙̦̝͔͔̗̯͖͙͖̤͉̺̯̗̩͇͍̼̦̞͔̻̼̫̱̭̯̩̥͎͎͓̼̙̦̟̹͎̥̺͕͔̠̥̗̭̻̭̖͚͕͔͕̦̦̖̯̜͖͚̘̠͓̣̥̩̞̪͇̮̲͖͓̜̬̻͓̳̠̥̤̘͙͇̜͖̺͕̭̖̤̳̟̳͉̣̣̣̼̗̖͎̣͓̳̝̙̝̭̲͎̝̹̻̘̙̳̤͍̲̘̹̻̪̺̪͉̤̠̬̯͕̘̦͇̺̼͎̦͎̺̙̭̬̳̠̝̜̺͓̯̣͇͍̦̙̮̰̞̩̼̦̻̻͈͔̣̬̬̻̝̹̼̘͈̦̥̠̲̘̭̺̭̺̥̤̪̠̣̫͓̻̫̰̖̬͎̗̰͕̘̣̗̮̻̣̺̯̝̺͍̹͓͍̩͓̹͓̲̺̙͕̙̻̼͈̞̩̼̝̟͇̙̣̫̠̪̟̻̻̱͚̥͍̭̜̠̺̮̟̥͉̫͕̹͈͈̹͍̗͈̰̯̲̥̰̠͚̤̠̜͎̳̘̲̞̼̙̗̟̖̥̠̗̰̖̮̥̼̤̺̻̜͍̠͎̳̫̳͚̟͎̬͈̳̹̯̻̰̫̫̥͎̳̩̙͉̩͕̟̟̙͚̠̭̞̪̭͔͙̻̘̯̲͔̫͚̼̭̹̳͕̙̥̹̩͇̗̟̳͔̰̟͈̫͓̘̳̼̳̪͔͎̮͎̮͈͚͍̖͈̉́̀̈́́́̅͆͊̏̄̐̊̊̀̀̈̉̍̃̿̐͐̀́͐̈́͋̋̽͌̽̇́̍̂̅͒̓͐̀͒̂̾̓͒̂̾́͋͒̆̈́͗͌̃̋̈́͐̈́̂̈́͒̆͛̐̽̌̍̀̾̑͋̂̐̽̽͆̎̋͒̽̈́̈͊̅̌̆͒̆̍̂̈́̐͛̀̌́̊͋͂̀͒̍̀̎̈́͂͒̇̽́̋̇́̌̊͋͒̊̒͊͂̈̌̓̋͌͊̀͂̇͊͛͌̈́̄̀̿̏̎̆́̉̄͒̑̽́̊̅̅̂̐̏́͊̔̇̓̓͂̔̈́̾͐̓̌̀̃̀̓̎̾̀͒̓̏͂͂̂̽͊̐̔͋̉̃͆̍̓͋̈̒̈͌̊̽̽̇̀̄͂͒̔̈͗͂͗̎͛̐̏̔͗̀̒͌̉̎̂̂͂̓̾́͂̀̆̑̍̾̍͒̔͋̎͗̒̈́͆͋̐̐̑͛̂͛̒̉̄͐̂̾̿̒́͒̒̾̀̄̀̌̅̐̓́́͆͑͑̃̋͒͌̾̊̎̽́̇̽̍̒̈́̍̄͑͆͋͆̿̂̾͆͑͊̿̂́̈́̑͐̑͆̀̽̿͒͐̐̀́̐̌͌̈́̿̆͆̇́̑̐̒̈́̓̏͊̈̈̍̾̅͆̑̇͑̂͆͛͊̈́̆̏͒́̂̍̄̃̍̀̊̏̌̽́̆̌̌̒̅͊͑̅̈́̎̋̉͊̇͋̈̔̅̑̉̈͒͛̂͌̈͐̌̏̀̑̆̏̀́̅̍̒͗͑͒̆̈̍́̍͐̆̄̽̎̉͌͊̒͋͑̽̂̔̃̀̅̒̊͌̊̽͊̑̄͌́̾̅̓͗́̈́͗̃͋̈́̄̒̍̌͆̈́̀̉͐̂̑̿͗̀̋̐͑̔̀̉̌̊̆͒̋̇̇̈̀̾̾͒͊̾̓̅̏̂̅̈́͛̎͆̅͂͑̉̆̾̓́̈́̎̒͑̊̔̌̋͂̍̔̋͒́̄́̓̅̎̊̃̌́̽͑̃̾͋͛̇̾̔̎̈́͛̄̑́̌̀̈́̉̒̇̇́̀̇̓̀͛̅̂̃͐̈́̇̋̈́͋̉̀̓͋͆͌͑͌̌́̈́̒̑̔̀̉̒̓̐̇̇́͐̿́̽͒̑̓͛̒̒͆̒̉̾̔̂̌̏̀͂̉̂̐͛̋͗̈́̃͗̐̕̕͘̕͘̚̕͘̕̚̕̚̚̚̕̕͘̕̚̕̕̚͘̕͘̚̚̕̚̕̚̕̚̚̕͘͘̚̚͘͘͘͘͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̷̵̢̨̨̡̛̹̞̝͈͙̩͈̟̘̯̦̳̭̰͇̲̳̩͇̲͔͚̗̙̬̯͚̝̩͉̖͇̜̬̞͚̯̩̼̥̫̯̹̩̩̳̮̞̳̖̞̜̰̯̼͎͉̮̭͂͌͐̎̔̾̈̐͋͆͗͛̋̀͛̊͐͑̍͒̐͜͜͜͝͝ͅͅͅẇ̸̷̴̶̵̷̷̴̴̵̶̶̶̵̵̷̴̴̴̷̸̶̴̶̷̸̷̷̷̶̸̸̡̧̢̡̧̧̨̢̡̨̨̢̨̧̢̧̢̧̧̢̡̧̡̢̢̡̨̡̨̡̡̧̡̧̨̧̢̡̧̧̢̡̧̨̡̧̡̧̢̨̧̧̡̧̧̧̡̨̢̢̡̢̢̢̧̡̢̢̡̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̪͎̱̳̰͇̺̝͔̩̲͍͙̤̗̰̻͍͍̟̻̺̣̘̪͚͖͇̣͇̤̗̞̜̜̫͙͎̜̠̪̘̺̪̺̫͓̙͔̙̤̫̖͓͉̘̯̦͔̞͚̰͍̗͎͚̥̹͈̰̞̟̘̟͖͙̤͇̺͕̜͖̱͇̥̦͇̝͖͕͎̝̪͙̲͕͔̺̪͙͖̣͚͈͕̟̰͍̜͔͔̝̖̮̟̹͉̼̬̟̲̖̼̘͈̞̟̣̖͕͎̱̫̫̞̣̳̞̹̩̩͈͙̩̺̯̳͇̙̦̠̣̬͇͎̹̹̪̝̦̼͎̯̩̲̞͍̟͓͕͇̱͎̞̞̻̺̩̮͈̼̱̺̭̭͚͖͖͖̣̟͇͚̫͇̹̖͈̥̤̗̲̬̖̺̝͔͚͎̼̪̬̞͇͇͓̪͇͖̫̯͕̭͕̤̞͚͈̻̠͔̬̞̫̣͓̟̮̙͉͔̬̞̠͚͇͈̙͕̦̻͍̩͈̙͔͍̙̰̲̫̗̬̮̜̼̦̮͎̫̼̻̹̯̯̝̗͔͍̻̬̤̼̪͍̺̩̯̪͓̰̤̳̪̻̫͓͓͙͎̥̬̲͇̯̞̺̼͚̝͇̣̯̠̝͉̤̹͈̘͙̱̟͉͎̩̭͇̙͍̬͎̠͖͍̭̝̻͎͓̜̩͎̩̙̩͈̫̗͕̝̩̮̙͕͚̝͙̫̞͕̭͈̖̲͚̗̤͕̺̼͈͇̼̫͚̫̟͈̰̪͈͈̺̤͎̙͓̗̟̳̖̤̫͔͈͈̼̮̰̩̫̖̩̗̯̗̞̝̩͉̗̘̦̞̺̼̻̲̩͎̦̳͈̤͍̫̠̺̹͇̮͖̯͕͍̤̪̪͔͉̩̦͉̗͖͍͓̻̘͚͓̣̥͎̫̘̖̳̖̳͉̱̤͇͎̣̩̫̟̘̰͎͙̮͍̬̥̳̙̖͔̹̗̺͕̳͖̤̤͖̤͇̗̗̤̺͉̞̲̤̙̠̮̫̼̪͇͍̘̣̼̗̮̳̺͚̱͚͚̮̳̺̙͔̹̦̙̰̗͚̟͚͖̜̪͎̩̠͍̱̭͈͇͕̠̼̺̩͖̰̞͈̭̪̞̮̰̘̘͓͎͔̟̗̼̘̲̝͕͓̲͇̖̠̙͈͚͉͍̰̤̣͉͎͈̼͚̘̤̜̠̼̦̗̠͓͙͖̬̜̹̹͎̙̝̰̲̖̪͎̝͍̤̰͕̰͇̙̞̮̫͔̤̳̪̼̻̙̹̜͈̳̰̫̻̰̥͎͓̞̯̙̰͈͇͎͙͙̖̰̳̭͉͕̳͍̠̳͙̞̰̩̥͎̘̲̣̟̥̥̭͇͓̂͐́͆̈́̉̒̌̈́̋́̑͛̄̆̌̒̈́̉͋͑͆̂̊̍̄̄͆̇̓̒̽̍̋̈́̓̈́́̋̒̉̀͐̇̔̂̃̿̓͆̒̀̈́͑̽̈͊́̔̔̑̀̃̑̃̅͆̅͗̆̀͆̇̊̆̋͑͊̇̈́̇͛͗̂̈́̓́͗͌̃͛͛̍̎̓͗̓̈́͛̽̾̿̋͒̈́̈́̈́̈́̃͊͂̂̈͗̊̓̍̀̾͌̏̅́̅̈́͐̑̉͑͐̔͊̈̾̎̑̋͆͆̉̔̾̇̋̋̇̎̓̄̈́̋̓̎̃̍̅̋̈́̍̓̆́̿̽̄̌́̊̄̓̍̎̔̄̈́̈̀̇̅̑̾̊̎͊̐̔͂͑̑̓͆̂̀̐͐̆͆̄͛̌̒̉͒͑̀̎̊̊́̈́̄̊̎̋̌̈̇̈́̽̔̒̒̇̃̆̿̅̈̄̋͌͑̊͛̓̔̂̃̔̾̿̏͗͑͋̌̈́̓̋͐͑̓͑̀̏̆̓̋̀̉̅̍̍̀̉̾̅̈̽̓͛͑̂̑̍̍̿͑͛̂̀̆͆̆͂͐̅́̓̈́͊̈́̒͐̃̇͗͑͐͌̌͊͋̈́́́̌́̄̄̍̈͒̓͆͒͐͋̉̓͆̐́̾̿͂͗̍̑̀͋͂̓̂̾̾͊̈́̈́̉̒̂̅̿́̓̒̆̓͋̄̏̀̆̄́̔͒̀͌̾̐̈͛̓̌̉͒̇̐̉̆̐̂̈́̊̎̔͑̓̑̓̓̏̏͗͌̑͌̏̔̽͐͛͊̈́̈́̉̈́̃͂̈́͌̍̆́̄̈́̔͌́͐̊̓̾͌̿͛͋͂̾̑̓̎̎̀͊̈́͐͛͋͑̽̈̈́̈́̐̒̈́̌̽̀̈̌͋̈́̍̃̃̒̉̍̓̎͐̉̈́͗͗̀̓̾̒̄͊̈́̾̾̋̏̈́͆͆̀̏̏́̓̔͗́̈́̈́́͛̂̈́̀̽͊̓̈́̂̄͛̃̒̌̍͊̀͐̿̾̈́́̐̈̇̿̈́̾͊̎̏̿͆̉̉̊͋̇͒̒̽̍̇͂͊̓̀͗̄͗̅̽̿̈́̓̒̂̈͆͋̓̈̓̅̇̈́̐̈͂̉̇̓̀̈́̐͌̀͗̄̈́̀͗͌̈̐̐̽̽̌͂̓̀̅͒̏̓̓̾̎͑̀͆̑͐̒́͊́͆͐͐̏̾͋̌́͛̈́̋̇̐̔͂̆͐̓̆̆͂̑̽̔́̓̓͗̽̑̑͑̓̍̄̉͊͊̽͋͂͐͐̉̈͒̑̑͊̈͌́͒̑͆̔̅̀̐̌͆̎̕̕̕̚̕͘̚̚̚̕̚̚̚̕̕̕͘̚̚̚͘̕͘̕̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̕̕̚̕͘͘͘̕͘̕͘̚̚̚̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅą̸̴̷̸̵̸̴̶̵̷̡̧̧̨̧̨̨̡̧̨̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̫͕͕̪͚̮͕̲͖̞͈͔͚̫̻̙̠̠̩̩͖̣͙͙̗͕͓͎͉̜̣͔̱̲̫͙̤͙͈̹̭̩͕̼̪͈̪̩̺̝̼͎̤̤̥͚̘̺̩̺̰͕͈̤̗͓͉̟͔̖͕̣̞̳̭̦͓̟͍̤̩͖̭̙͎̳̺͕͇͕̼̩̦̲̪̺̼̲̩͖̘͉̣̳̱̹̱̟̪̥͇͍͇̣̼̠̬̪̭̮͙͓͕͎̫͚͖̙͉̇̆̓͂͐̏́̓̎̈͑́͛̆͆̑̎̀̀͛̈́̌̍̈́̇̈́̉̍̒̈̓̍́͗͛̊͛̾͊͒͑͊̑̒̉͒͆́̈̓̎̄̈́̉̏͑͛̂́̈́̄̑̑͑͋̅͗̎̈̊̈́́͂͆̑̅̏͌̈́̎͂̄́͒̔͆͒̌̒̉̽̑͋̽̓̊̄̔̃̄̎͒̑̀̽̈́͂̀͊̊̿̌̒̌̇̋̏͒̔̅̓͑̓̏̓̽͊̌͗̔̄̆̇̆͛̓͂̇͛̿̽̐̐͒͆̿̓̓̌̔̌̉̇͆͛̿̃͑́̀͗̔͘̚̕̕͘͘͘͘̚̕̚͜͝͝͝͝ͅͅ ̵̵̷̴̵̷̷̸̶̷̷̶̸̴̵̴̷̷̵̷̵̢̡̡̧̡̢̡̨̧̢̢̡̧̨̨̡̢̢̡̡̧̨̢̢̨̨̨̨̡̢̧̧̢̡̧̢̡̨̧̧̧̨̧̡̨̨̨̡̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̳̪̟͉̯̖͖̮̩͕̖̳̫͓͎̱͈͈͚̻͕͇̬̺̭̬̞͓͙̫̤̖͎͕͚̺̮̣͖͔̠͔̥̹̫͓̩̹̻͉̺̫̳̳̘͕̱͔̥͉̯͓̜̱̰̖͚̙̙͓͓͍͈͖̻̱̘͚͇̯̥̼̹͍̺̱͔͚̘̺͇̭̪̼͎̖̗̝̮̗̰̼̲͇̤̟̖̦̺̫̘̘̦̪̜̯͕̳̤̙̹͉̦̦͎̜̳͍̺͙̝̰̞̲͙͔̯͚͓̞̯͖̞̻̲͕͙̰̦̩̼̗͇̘̻̭̻̙̳̺̺̦̖̝̰͎̘͔͔̤̘̞̯͈͉̙͔͙̲͇̮̱̤̰̼̤̲͈͎͎̤̳͈͓̗͇̟͚͕̻̥͇͉͖̼̥̝̺̭̱̘̤̰̩̣̪̖̤̘̻̝̗͖͔̻̺̳̗̗̞͔̫̼̪͍̼̲̱̖̜̭͖̲͔̣̞̜͎̯̹̟̥͖̲̤̗͇̣̥͍͉̙̩̺̼̪͉̝̭̺̙̣̳̮̗̮̹͍̯͈̺̣̠̥̟̮͚͓͕̩̣̗̰͚͇̼̝̟͔͔̳͓̣̩̤̠̪̪̠̞̰̼̜̦̤̩̘̘̖͇̝̩͚̟̱͕̯̪̳̖͎̲̣̲͎͚̝̺͔̠̱̳̥̙͕͎͕͉̜̟̞̻̩̝̞̣͕̹͖̼̺͈͉͚̣͎̘̦̝̯͉͇̹͉̻̤̞͕̱͈͓̼̝͖̮͙̱̘̬̜̩͍͇͔̩̙̼̫̘̹͖̤͈̣͉̟̦̗̯͕̜̫̩̭̪̪͇̙̘͚͇̱̝̜̮̦̪̫͍̲̳͓͔̬̰͎̳̫͓͙͎̝͎̯̰̞̻̓͐̓̇̊̐͛̎̾̀̅̽̃̿̾͑̎̎̑͌̇̿̃̋͋͐̓̀̎̋͌̿̐̐̋͌̐̔̑̑̇͆̈́̏͂̅͑̑̔̐͑̓͌̄͗̆̊͆͊͆̂̔̾́͂̀̀̀̉́̂̾̆̌̉́̈́̏͒̅̑͒̓̌͌͗͌̃̈̀̂̊̔͗̈́́̌̐̇͗̃̈́̐͆͐͒̋́͒͌͆̉̌̒͗͗́͆͂̆̀̀̓̎͐̂̀͛̎̏̎͋̀̏͆̓̈̒̆͗͐͋͗͐̈̇̌̈͛̑͑̒̊͋̽͋̈́̂̒̿̏͂̃͂͂͌́̌̈́̎̿̅̈͊̈́̑̿̇̉̉̐͐͋͛̍̃͐̽̒̉̿́̓̊̑͂̉̒͌͛̅͋̐͊͋͂̿̃̋̽̓̒̐͋̃̀͒̆̌̐͂̈́̓̀̆͊̄̅̐̋̾͆͐̄͊͋͗͌͒̌͒̉̋̿͑͛̃͂́̇́̈́̃̇͋̌̎̎̌̈́̈̿̾̃͒͂̒͑͋̿̇̌̈́̃̌̈́̃̌̓̍̈̾̌͛̾͛͑̆͊́̅́̀̊͋̑̑̑̈́͛̈́̈́̑̀̂́͑̈́̓̓̀̓͂̒͌͛̾̿͐̀̿̏͂͌̑̈͆͊̂͌̾̾͛̐̀̓̌̿̒̊́͋͗͗̍̃̒͒̎͆͊̅͌̋̈̈̌͆͂̍̓̆̈́̏̂̉̓͂́̉̽͊̌͋̐̎̒̎̂́͆́͗̓͒̑͋̇̏͂̓̓̍̀͒̾̈̍̽͑̈́̇͊͋̽͌̑̔͂̃̊̓͆̽̀̏͛̅̑̃̈̑̓̈͐̋̉͑́̏̂̽͗͋̇́̌̓͋̀͐̏̌̌͌̒͑̈́̌̏̂̓̇̋̅̿́͛͒̈͛̄̀̊͛̍̆̿͗͂͌̄̾̕̕͘̚̚͘̕̕͘̕̚͘͘͘̚̚̚̕̚͘̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̚̕̚͘̕͘̕̕̕̚̕͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅw̶̸̸̵̸̴̵̵̷̸̷̸̷̴̵̶̴̴̶̡̡̨̢̡̡̢̧̨̢̢̨̡̨̢̨̢̢̨̧̧̢̨̡̧̨̡̧̢̨̨̧̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̗͈͙͙̲̱͉̟͍̞̦͇̤̗̯̱̟̠̯̖̙̲͇̹̞̱̜̬͖͖̮̘̝̱̜͇͔̖̘̬̫̝̜̱̠͖̘̰̞̲̭͔̹̥̦̰̼̠̗̲̻͉̞͔̣͇͇̥̲͎̙̙̟̜̜̠͎͇̝͎͎̱̟̯͔̗̯̺͉̜͙̠̰̰͚͓͕̱̥̼͙̦̞̜̦̟̳̭̜̞̲͎͎͈͔̦̬̰̻̺̣̱͖͔̜̘̺͍̬̳̜͖̹̩̹̫̻̤̯̪̣͎̠͈̤̞͙͉̫̜̺̟̘̫͉͙̗̜͍̩̤̥̖̼͚͔͖̯̺̫̤̻̮̣̟̱̫̬̙̯͈̥̞̻̪̤̻̠͕͔͔̭̫̙͉̗͓̮͍̰͍͖̩͍̖͚͔̠͉̟̱̪̝̗̬̗̫̞̙͚͍̳͎͍͕͇͉̱̯̤̪͍̼̥̰̹̲̯͓̞̩̣̬̮̹̙̠̼̲͚̘̫͖͔̫̩̼̤͖̰͚̹̳̬̦̝̬̦͇̬͉͔̦̬̣͎̩͚͓̪̦͈̜̗̫̯̪͉͙͉̗̣͍̘͔͙̘̱͍̼̘͚͎͔̝̻͇͍̱̝̟̜̠̥̗͇͉͍̠̖̤̲͉̘̲͙̼͚̰̤̼̭̬̻͇̺͚̬̪̭̖͉̘͎͍͖̘͖̫̙̩̝̗̘̬̺͎̳̺͍͙͈͍̦̥̋̾̅̒͆͋̂̿̈́̆̿͊͂́̎͗̒̽̉́̽̑̂̈͂̂̍̾͆͑͆̆͊̒̑́͌͆͊̆͐͂̓͒̍̊̂̃́̔̄̽͛͒͊̑̑͒͛͑̎̔̿̐̏̎́̌̈́̑̄̍̈́̌̍͑̿̓̿͊̑͑̌̈́̅̑̑͂͂̒̒̀̌̉͊͂̈̽̄̂͐̍͌͒̄̽̀̊͋̀̄̏̆̐̍͐̄̉̄͛͗̿̐̔̄͂͑̒́͐́̉̎̊̎̓͋́̈́̄̃͐͒̒̊̓̇̈̑̿͛͐̀̇͌͂̀̋̐̉̍͋̌̔͐̈́͐̒̅̾̽̊̐͐̍̔͑̌͊͒̈́̂͗̒̍̆͂͒͒̈́͐́̈́̌̀̆͂̈́̾̈́͆̒̓̌̾̊̌̈́̄̆̋̀̾͂̿̆̌̊̆͆̐̓͐̈̊́̒̎̈́͊̈́̃̑̎͐̾́̏̈́̓̊̾́͌͛̒̊̀̇͊̎̽͊̅̈̊̿̅̄̓̓̅̋̂͋͗̓͂͋̄̈́̔͆̈́͊̒̈́̎̀́̆̂̃͂̌̑͐͒͆̏̿͂̋͒̓͛̑͊͋̑̾̌̓͋̀̀͆͂͑̐͂̌͛̃̐͂̂̊̆́̉͑̅̆͐́̉̏͑̓̆̀̈̿̀͆́̎͋͗͊̒̿̌̈́͂̅̾͂͌͂͒́͌͒̅̾̑̋͆̿̿̄͗̏̅͊̇̋͋̍̋̆́́͒̀̏̾̐͐͊̾̎͛̑͆̓͊͂́̃͌̇̄͑͂̌̾̌͂̏̆͂̏́̚͘̚̚͘͘̚̚̕̕̕͘̕͘̚͘̕͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̶̨̨̡̛̛̬̭̳͉͔͔̱̗̬͎̦̤͖̗̫̉̃̿̏̽̈͛̓͛͐̾͆͌͗͐͊͊͐̇̄̆̽̈́́̓̄̑́̏̐̍̓͗̂̄̕͘͜͝͝ͅͅw̷̷̵̸̶̶̷̵̴̶̷̸̷̸̷̸̵̸̴̸̴̵̸̷̶̴̴̶̵̸̸̵̴̵̷̶̵̷̢̡̨̢̡̨̨̢̢̡̨̢̨̧̡̧̨̨̡̡̧̢̡̡̡̢̡̨̧̢̨̢̢̨̢̡̡̡̧̢̢̡̢̧̢̨̡̧̡̢̢̢̢̢̡̧̨̢̡̨̨̡̢̡̡̢̢̧̨̧̨̨̨̧̢̧̧̡̡̡̧̧̢̧̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̜͖̹̹̹̬̝̬̹̱͓̲͎̤̪̖͍̳̣̺̖͔̖͉̬̼̩̪͍̞̫̥̙͓̦̥̺̲͚̲̙̼̙̹̟̞̪͚̱̫̻͎͔̼̻͍͎̩̼̜̟͉̙̩̬͚̩̫̙͙͎͙̜̭̺̩͕͖̰̟͉͇͓̳̻̲̜̩̻̥͎̝̟͓̦̣̯̗̳̯͙͚̹͕̻̲̩͉̜̭̥̱̺̜̤̙̦̣͎̤͕̻̙͙̤̙͍͓̪͔͎̫͓͉̯̬̻͔̖̻͓̹̮͕̗̱͚̜̻̮͙̝̩͎͍̱̩̹̤̤̺͔͕̳͕͍͓͇̺̭͎̹͔͔̘͉̬̺̟͎̻̥͇̤̟͉͇̥̖̭̣̺̤̪͉̮̜̲̱̪̘͉̙̠̟̦̻͔̻̙̯͖̬̠͚̭̪̖̬̳̫̦̟͍͔͕̪̙͎̗̳͚̜̤͈̫̣̦͔̞͙̯̼̰̰̥̙̳͙̥̞̟͍̳̘̭̙͇͔̭͕͇͎͙̠̲̥̮͙̜̰̖̘̠̜̮̜̟̻̙̗̻̜͇̰̲̥̣͔̝̫̻̙̩̫͔͓͔̙̖̳̻̬͎͎̩̙̳̼̪̫͚͇͈̬̖͚̪̭̦͚̠̱̣̠̭͔̼̫̹̖̙̼͇͖̺͎͓̺̥͍̞̻̙̘̬̺̭̠͍̘̞͇̭̹̙̜̹̠̱̲̦̱͎̗̝̯̫̻̼͖̜̞̻͍͎̪̭̘̠̹̩̙̲̹̤̣̟̖̫̙̩̼̼̺̤͕̰̪̪̹̗̫̟̤͈̘͈͔̙̱͖̥̙̮͕̫͍̠̟͙͇̮͙̯̩͕͔̣̭̦͉͈͉̩̬̤̯̲̥̟̗̲̳͕͓͕͇͔̟̹͍̳͎͚̘̖̫̬͙̦͎̳̙̳̲̟̜̱̮̼̳̥͍͈̝̣̣̮͙̟̲̯̜̗̳̜͔͖̦̯̙̹͖̟͙͎̥͍̺͔̲̩̠͓̩͔̤͈̻͇̘̪̬̣̤̝͍͎͙̥͕̮̭̤͕̙͖͈̲̙̤̖̯͉͓͖̪̩͚̲̖͕͈̙̬͈̦̮̠̮̥͇̫̯̪̯̗̱̥̭̜͔̮͔̲͇͓̹͕͕͎͉̯̯̭̤͍͙̳̪͓͎̥̘̙͈̯̠̝̮͈̱̮̝̜̳͉̜̳̠̤̦̩͉̳̼͚͍̮͉̞̜̜͓̫͓͇̻̯͎̬̟̬̺̙̳̼̙̮̼͔̙̮̺̠̰̤̠̘̯̭͖̼̟͚̯̟͉̺̪͇̖̳̱̭̰̣̭̮̣͓̟̰̙̜̲͔̯͖͍͖̬̼͉͇̭͉͚̺̯̣͉̗̺̤̼̯̱͕͔̠̗͈̜̘̱̠̘̖̘̫̲̘͉̰̟̯̜̳͚̫̖͙̗̤̟̤̘̰̲̙̥͚͉̥̰͔͎̳̱̬̠̮̟̜̦̖̫͙̪̗̺̳͕̳̮͚̤̯̲̻̥̠̖̝̻̲̠͉̜͚͒́̾̾̇̎̈́̉̈́̈́͋̽̀̅̒̊̂̃̔̓̇͐̈́̅̽̅̿́̎̌͌̈́̒̽͆̾̽̾́̒͊͒͗͆̂̎́̓̆͆́́̎̽̈̈́͗̈́̏͂̃̊͆̄̎̍̊̑̀̔̅́̀̉̂͒̉͒̈́̏͂̅̐̓̈́͂̃́͐̀̔̍̇͒̏̇͆̾̍̀͛̽͗̊̋͋͊̇͗͐̓̽́̄͆̔͑́̀̂̂̿́̈̈́̑̊̔̓͛͊̉͛̉̑͊͊́̂͛͂͒̇͐̀̊͛̓̌̑̍̿̏̆̌̾̐̓͂̅̒̂̓̅̽̄̈́̅̆̍̂̐̈́̋͛̑͗̇̈́̓͑̈̏̇͂̓̍̈́̈̐̂̑͌͑͆̓̈́͊̑̊͒̇̆̉̈́̀͗̆͛̌̇͑̈́̒͋̌̑̿͆̑̒́̄͒͒̔̀͂̐̂̑͌̀͛͑͑́̇͌̉̇̎̽̏͑̔͋̓͒͌͋͆́̋͌͛̿̍̈́͋̽͋́̂͛̃̅̈̑̓́̓̔̑̽͆̔̋̀̿́̉̎̈́̐̐̅̓͗̈͆̽̃̎͌̆̈͊̄͒̈̾̽̉́́̈́̔̓̽̄̔͋̓̈́̏̔̓̉͊̾̈̓̔͋̏̌̏̀͒͗̎́̈́͛͒̌̄͐͋̒͊̑͑̌́̉͑̀͆͌̉̈̈́̈́̒̂̈́͂͑̐͊̌͌͋̉̎́̂͛͛̐̓̀̈͗̈͆͆͒̏̆͒̆̄͑̋̉̉͑̈́̆̆͌͑̀́͆̂̑́̓͂̍̑̌̃̌̓́̇̌́̑͊̓̔̌̈̓́͗̀̌̌̄̃͊̈͊͑̂̔͑̔̀͐̋̓̾̔̎̇̀͗̇͆͆̈̀̈́̋́̓̎̑̅̓͂̔̂͂͑͐̃͂̑̈́͌́̀̀̔̔̐̒̈̆̉͒̇̅͐̆̈́̾́̀̈́̈̓̃̌̈̉̃̉̇̒̀̀̌̾̃̆͛̈̔̂̈̀͋̏͑͛̄͊̊̾̀͆̊́͂͐̑̃̌̇͌̆̊̈́͊̃̇̏̒͑͊̅̉́͒͗̇̇̾͌̊̓̊͌̌͐̔̎̀͆̿̿̒̆́͂̅͋̔͐̍̋̀͋̊̈́̄̋̓̐͐͒̾̈́̎̈́̉̾̆́͛̇̔͛̿͛̅̃̑͗̇̏̾̋̿͌́́̒̈͗̌̈́͆̀̓̈͂̏̾̈́̽̿̀̈́̔͛̏̉̿͑̈̿͊̿̄͑͐͐̿̀̓̀̋̈́̈́̊̎̍̄̀̀̑̈́̿́̏̌̐̈́͑̏͋̓̑̓͑̇̍̋͛̂͐͋̐͑̓̊͗̂̆̉̈́͊̍̐́̔͐́͊͒̍͋͊̈͋͌̈́͑̂͛̏͆̽̉̅͗͗͂̉̿̂͐̔̍͌̆̃̄̀͐̈́̓̄̄̔̍̀̆̆̿̿̎͑̓̓̈́̉̇̋͒́̓͊̓̇͆̈́͗̑̑̈́͂̅̔͂͑͗̎͆͑̈́̆̄̉̄̒̿̇̀̍̉̓̿̃̈́̉̃͌̎̍̋̋̆̃̓̇̈́͊͌͌͛̀̓̔̾̂͛̓̽̍͛̐̅̔͗̓͛̾̑̔͒̋̾̑̑̍́͛̅́̎̐̀͆̿̈́͊́́̀̾́̄͑̀̓̓͊̄̔̏̾͆͋̄̈́̎̄̅̒͋̒̐̄́̌̓͂̀͐̑̈́̾̃̆̆̚̚̕͘̕͘̕̚̕̚͘̚̕̚͘͘̕͘̚͘̚͘̕͘͘̚̕͘̚͘̕̚̕̚̕̚̚͘̕͘̚̕͘͘̕͘̕̚̕̚̕̚͘̕̕̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̵̸̸̵̷̸̸̷̶̵̷̵̵̵̵̴̵̷̴̵̸̸̴̴̢̡̧̨̢̢̡̢̨̡̧̡̧̧̧̨̢̢̨̢̨̢̨̨̢̨̨̨̡̧̨̢̢̢̧̢̡̢̨̡̡̢̢̨̢̨̧̡̡̢̧̧̧̧̢̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̦̣̳͇̟͍̖̘̼̟͈̩̬͖̯͖̯̜̭̮͉̝̺̲̮͔͔̮̲̘̦̹̦̜̮̩̞͖̮̫̥̰̮̪͔̺̻͔͕͕̥̭̤̝͙͖̠̤̮̥͕̠͚̤̭̗͈̰̥͕̤͎̞͙̳̭̦̲͉̰͖̫̞̯̭̜̖͉̩̗̮̯̤̰͔͖̳̞̠̪̜̗̬͈̩̩̠̝̰̘͍͙̫͕͖̖̞̦̪͈̫͇̪̝͖̱̣̟̗̪̗͙͚̞͍̲͔̺̯̦̪͓̜̬͔͍͎̗̱̪͕̳͓͓̖̣̝͔̯̭̩͉̞͍̣̝̣̣̤͙̰͎̞̥̠͙͓̘̬͕̘͚͍͕̜̦̥̘̖̪̼͕͕̲̻̰̰͚̘̮̲̪̺̤̻͉̟͇̤̳͍͚͙͇̤̝̻̠̳̼̱͇͕̱̖͚̭͓͈̯̱͉̫̬͎͈̣̥̹̭͚̺̝̫̗͙̦̠̯̹͔̼͙̘͖̤̙͙͔̦̭̗̮̣̲̥̗͈̣͕̟̮̮̬̳̪̻̼̮̭͎̹̭͕̦̺̖̮̠̝̖͓̙̮̥̜̪̬̗͈̠̪̞͍̰̺͈̗̤͎̭̣̫̱̯͍̠͕̮̩̣̮͖̟̳̞̹͚̭͖̜͚̻̺͈̱̫̬͓̹̼̣͔̝̲̥͉̖̯͙̹̝̪̫̬͙̠͖͖̯̖͈͔̩̦͚͈̯͔͙̘̥̼̦̱̭͔̪̫̹̥͓̱̟̭͔̜̩̤̪̺̙͖̫̙͎̰̣͈̘̤̞͎̤̣̗̞̹̘̠̦̞̖͚̯͚̹̤̳̻̫̥̩͈̬͎͖͕̦͓̥̮͇̰̥̠̦̱̥̱̪̬̗̺͉͉͕̥̟̫̟̯̘͔͕̻̮̗̖͕̝̼̼̪͓̻̱̲̖̟̭͎͖̘͚̳͖͎͉̦̟̻̦̫̫̖̠̰̭͓͎̱̖͙̬̑̾̓͋̎͊̅́̈́̈́̽̑̋̀̂̇̓̀́̀̑́͆̽͛̐̒͗͐͆͌̔̈͆͐̊͊͛̌͐͛́̋́̈́̈̎̃͒́̎̄̌͛͒̉̿͆̈͂̉͛̊̆̋̒̄̿͌̈́̃̊͂̅̊͗̎̾͐̀͛͂́̾̄̆̿́͒̐̓̔̈́̏̄̈́̿̈́̀̊̓̓͌̓̈́̆͒̊̑̓̿̄́̀̇̇̓̎͆̽̎̾̊̌͆̒͆̈́̌̐͌̍̾̆͌͂̄̑̃͋͋͑͛̌̋͗̇̈̊̈́̿̇͂́͛̀̒͊̋͐̿͒̈́̿̇̀̐́͆̽͑̈́͌̄̀̑̊̀̆̽́̐̏͗̊̉̃̈̈́̇͗͗͋̃͂̋͂̽͌̍̀͂͌̈́͆̈́̈̒̏̅̂̾͊͆̆͛͊̌̆̐̿̐͋̽̍̇̒̅͊̍̾̇́̒̊̏͂͂͋̋̋͐̏͆̀̅̽̌̔͐̃͋̅̓͛̓̿̃̇́̃́̀͒̽͂̈́̎̎̇̊̀̉̂͆͛͐͂͌̍͆̈́͊͒͊͗͂̒̃̾̿̈́͂͑̒͆́̊̓́̌̇͒̅̀̓̃͛̒̑̌͊̊̃͆̅̎̈́̊͒̎͊̓̏̄̄̐̅̑̈́̇̑̌̈́̆̿́̎͗̋́̅͆̂̔̄̓̑̌̅͒́̽̃͗̏͛̋̓̊̈́́͊͛́̌̈́̂̔̂̿̀͐̔̂̌̓̊̉̾̓̽͐̒͗͊̄͑̄̈͗̍̿̃͂̍̎̎̀̒͑̍̅͌͐̊̿͒̿̑̏̀͗͗̈́̄̾̐̒͗̂̍̈́̅̑͗͊̾́͂̐̈́̀̀̅̒͐̀̒̅͌̍̍͐̀̂̏́̓͑̐͆̀͒̊͆͒̀̀̃̄̀̈̈́̀̎̉̃̋̏̆̾̍̚̚̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕̚͘̚̕͘̚̕͘̚̕̚̕̕̚̕͘̕̚̚̚̚̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅa̶̵̴̵̴̴̶̷̷̵̸̴̷̷̶̷̶̶̡̨̢̡̨̨̨̨̡̢̡̢̡̨̨̢̡̡̢̧̢̧̡̧̢̨̡̧̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛͙͕̺̻̘̠̺̖͉͉̦̞̦̻͈̺͈͉̣͎͖̩̦̪̙͖̮͎͓̺͇̪̮͍̻̦̩̻̱̝̮̳͖͕̖͎̦̘̦̯̜͈̘̭͔̘̩̤̟͔͈̜͓̳̩͇̩̰̙͍̘̜̗͔̩̖̯̦͚̗̬̯͕͖̞̤̺͖̪̖̬̱̼̫͎͎̰͎̩̲̱̞̦̖͙̦̰͙̝͖͚̣͕̖͔͔̞̬̤͈͎̜̲͈͉͈̹̪̼͇͍͙̰̙̳̲̗̤͖͍͇̲͖͚̯̰͖̘̮̻̯͈̖͙̥̬̻͔̭̬̮͈͉̰̜̯̟̥͖̤͈̦̩̥͚̹̙̮͕̙̥̜͓̩̣͈̥͙͉͙̬͍̯̳̳̤̣͚̼̼̱̞͈̖̰̭͎̱͎̻͚̣̤̬̟̺͉̪̥̥̮̪̻͚̠̺̟̭͓͖͉̭̟̙̭̻̝̬̥͙͈̭̤̟̬̪̠̞̲͇͚̹̪̜̖͔̻̤̩͓̝͖̖̺͔̫͍̘͉̫͓̲͍̩̘̘͔̹̰̖̺̪̫̝̺̲̻͔̻̙̹̥͍͉̜̳̹̯͍̻͎̜̹̝͍̝͚̣̮̩͙̜̱̟̤͚͎͈̹̹̙̣̲͎̣̳̦͎̲̙͚̖̱̻̩̣̥̠̗̯̞̳̗̯͚͈͖̜͕̻̻͈̘̗̠̻̮͕̫̱̱̠̹̯͎̘̼̺͉̘͖̭͕̪̠͔̭̯̘̲͖͎̻̩̱̩͚͙̯̠̳̣̼̥̯̟̭͓͔̘̪̰̫̦̥̼̽͛̽̾͋̒̃̊͛̿̉̍̇͌͋̈͂͋͋̑́͐͂̆͐͗͗̑̊͂̅̈́͌̊́͗͛̄̀́̈́̒̀̐̇̊́̏̍̉̍́̉̇̉͛͋̄͑̒̍̏͊̋̏̍̌̓͂̂̾̅̌͐̊̎̈́̃̅͋̔̾̎́̈́̈́͐̈́̔̆̏̈́̈͆̈́̈́̎̂̉́̈́̆̏̿̀̏͊͊͛̏͆́̂̆̐̐̀͐́̒̅̄̓͐̃́̾͒̿͂̒͗̂̀͌̉̅̎̍̂͗̒͐͌̓̔̍͗́̾̓̀̒̃͊̌̽͂̍̓̓̿͆̉̀̔͆̎̽̈̊̏͋͒͐͑͒͛͌̔͋͆̆̒̉͑̈́̽̑͋̃́̊̐̃̈̽̏̔͛̀̏̈͋͂́̅̋̀͌̆̄͛͒̒̀̌̽̃͂̀̃̀͐̃̆̇̂̋̑͋̍͐͂͒̍̐͑͒͌͋̒͗̂̓̊̒̂̾̎̾͋̊͋̀͑͆̀̎͊̈́͊̎̏̾̎͋̐͑͒̋̈́͛̅̂̌̊̍͗̂͂̇̉͆̉̔̒̈́͌̀̈́̀̌̅̓̀̀̅̉̂̿̎̌̋̿̅̈̓͊̍̂̿̚̚̚̚̕͘͘͘̕̕̚͘͘̕͘̚̕̕̕̚̕̚̚̚͘̚̚̚͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̸̵̵̴̵̶̵̴̸̵̸̷̸̷̴̶̴̷̷̴̶̶̡̧̢̧̢̢̧̨̢̨̢̡̢̢̧̨̧̡̢̨̡̨̡̡̧̢̨̡̨̢̨̧̡̢̡̢̨̡̢̢̨̧̨̡̢̢̡̡̡̧̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̹̜͚͎̩̹͍̪̖̰̱̳̘̘̤̩͈͉̜̲̞̜͙̜̪̼̗͙̟̥̥̣͍̙͓̥̯̤̫̗̘̪̺̰̦̣͎̤͚̰̰̰̺͚̦̥͙̘̺̪̞̰̞͍̩͎͙͎͈̳͙͎͕̝̥̲͕̯̩͔̪̜̙͙̦͉͈̥͔̤̥͉̝̘̜̪͍͙̯̜͉̟̰͓̟̭̥̫̲̺̭̝̘̣̥͉̪̟͇͙̼̹̫̖͉̘̲̬̱̖̲͙̜͓̟̖̳͇͔̣̻̞̖̗͖̯͕͓̥͇͉̰̙̤̫̲̥̞̦̬̘͖͙̗͍̪̩͉̳̳͇̫̺͙̫̥̻͔͔̠̙̰͖̭͖̠̩͍̰̭͖̣̲̜̻̱̘͕͈͍̖͕̭̲͈̪̝̖͚̗̖̻̤͖̺̗̯̗̺̲͇͚̙͈̫͍̫̗͇̝͚̙͇͎̮̣̩͍̮̠̪̪̘͔̼͎͍̝̠͇̩͇͚̰͈͉̳͕̪̖̲̟̥͇̖̫͕̺͙̟̘̫͖̣̫̤̳̝̥͚̠̥̮̻̝̣̩͖̠̙̭͕̙̪̳̜͕̱͈̜̫͕̜͖̗̻̩̳͓͉̺̥͓̬̦̳͔̞͇̱͇̠̥̩͍̻̬̱̩̱͉͖̻̥͍͔̟̺̟̟͚͔̘̰̪͖̝͕͕̦̮͙͎͇͍̮̖̠̟̩̖͍̭̠̮͈̣̮͓̱̤̗͍̩̤̙͕͙̤̳̟͈̯̞̲͇͍͉̮̲̭̬̯̯̖̘̭̞͙̦͙̩̭͇̟̥͚̞̲̟̻̦̜̪͙̠̯̻̪̞̝̙͈̥̠̳̰̹͚͖̱̳̲̼̝͇͙͓͇̭̺̤͕̝͔̯̦̼͔̙̗̻̺̝̫̬̱͉̖͖͓̤̞̝͖̜͙̙͖̭̳̘̭̰̦̖͇̦̯̳͉̙͙̰̰͚͓̘̩̣̯͈͇̟̬̲̠̺͍̖͉̮̮̩͉̬̘͚͚̼̻̻́̈́́́̔̍̈̀͌̈́̾̽́͋͒͛̓͛͗̈̒̂̈́̓̽̒̊̀̒̈͐̿̿͊̃͋͆͆̈́̑͌͑́̍̃͒͒́̽͒̈́̃͆̄̑̈̊̋̇͌̇̃͑̿̂̀́̀͒͗͋̽̈́̂̑͒͛̓̐́̊̅͊̔͒̋͊̀̌̋̏̇̈́͛̓̋̓̂͊͌͒̾̆̎̇͒̀̓̈́̓̄̂̿̋͑́̎̂͐̔̔̿͛̿̐̋̉̈̂̀̓̀̇̋͒̆͐̑̏̋̐̀̈̔̈́̄̽͗́̋́͌̈́́̎̾́̀͆͋̃̽̈̉͊̅̓̃̋͛̈́̀̈́̈́͆̓̈͊͆̊͂̀̄͊̈͐̎̊̽̓͋̓̎̇̈́́̔́̃́͆̇̈̎̀̆̓́̂̈́̀̇̔̾͊̈́͒͒̅͌̅̀͑̀̊̈́̉̍̄̅̀̊̀̏̏̏̔̾̽̌̀̒͋̾͌̐̎̌̐͋̈́̎͒̔̾̔̈́̃̽̃̏̔̉̓̇̋̀́̐͑̅͆͐͗͆́͒̈́̍̽͐̀̉͆̀̎̑̀̎͌̂̈́̂̓͌͋́̅̆̆̾̇̐̃̑̽͂͆̏̑́́̊̃͗͐̈́̔͆͛͋͊͌̌̌̈́͌̒̆̈͌͐̇̃̽̊͆̆̋̊̉͂̐̌́̔̇̊̈́͒͌̿͆̾̎̂̒̂̒̈́̽̃̀̊̄́̓͌̾́̑̂̐̆̋͂̀̒̒͑̊̉̒̉̇̅̂̽̎̊̐̑̿̈́͂̉̓̓̅͗̔̆͂̐̒̈́͌̋̇͊̋͑͋̓͌̏̍̍̿͒̾̒̔̈́̓̃͋͐͂̓͗̐͛̈́̑̒̍̋̐͒͛͒̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̚̕͘̕͘͘͘̚̕̚̕͘̚̚͘̕̚̚̕͘̕̕̚̚͘̚͘̚͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅṃ̸̴̴̵̴̵̵̶̸̶̶̶̷̵̶̶̡̨̡̢̨̧̨̧̡̧̨̢̨̨̡̢̨̧̢̢̧̨̧̡̨̨̧̢̨̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̩͚͙̙̯̗͈̫̫͖͖̦͍̗͉͈̤̟̗͕̳̮͈͇͎̗̬̤̻̹̼̞̯̝̠͔͙̤̠̠͇͕̣͖͎͓̖̯̝͚̮̲̻͈̦̭̱͖̱͈͙̙̝̳̲̝̦͖̣̫̪͖̖̪̣̙͖͍̝̫̫͚͇̳̲̖̗̱͖͎̖̯̝̱̥̠̩̩͖̠̖͉̟̰̼̝͎͍̰͕͈̰̳͙̦̱͓̰̣̘͈̰͔̬̻͎̖̝͕͇͔̰̩̟̮͇̩̪̺̮̟̼̺̟̥͍̘̘̙͍̥͕̩̖̤̜͈̮̳͇͎͓̫̩̻̜̲͈̖͈̘͓͔̖̭͍̬͚̮̬̮̻̖̦̭̪͚͉̙͚̦̗̩̙̥̣͇̬̞̦̞̲̪̜̯̠̟͍͙̬̜̞̭͇͈̻̪̤̱̜̯̟̲̘̪̰̮̟͙̘̟̖̗̘͇̥̳͖͔̮̗̺̣̖͔̤͖̗̰̪͈̦̱̤̮̼̦̥̗̘̼̗̯̠͉̩̠̦͓̗̟̬̼͇̤̭̩̺͎̞̻̟̳̱͉̳̰̰̤̫̖͚͎̯͉͕̭͙̯̖̫̫̰̖̲̣͔̣͎͕̖̪̙͕̘̲̗̞̥͚̟͙̣̤͔̭͖͈̗̰͙͕͍̖͖̬͔̞̤̟̬̜̼̅͂̐̆̀̓̈́͒͂̈́̐̃̆̆̐̈́̓̑̏̃̎͛͊͆̈̑͗͒͋̾͐̆̀͐̌̐̊̈́̾̅̍͂̿̒̔̽̔͆̈͊̋͗̍́̏̑͌͑̔̈̿̒̈͛̋̍̄̈́͛̽̋̀͛͋͗̊̎̈́̒̂̆̊̎̄̐̆̊́̅̌̿̎͐̒̃̎̌̅̓͗͋͌̓̈́̀̆̓̌̎̓́͛́͊̽̇̈́͐̅͋̈́̉̇̓̈͐̐͊̿̎͗̽̄̋̄̾̆̋̈́͗͂̋̋͗̈́͊́̾͌̐̔͐̅̔̅͒́̈́͂̔͋̏͐̋̿͗͐̿͐̾̽͑̾̈́̐͒̀̈͋͛̑̽̽̊̆̍̊̾̏͂͌̌̄͑͊̑̐̉̒̾̋̑̒̌́̑͛̑̅̈́̇̏̑͑̏̅̄̿̎̅̀̈́́́́̃̓̈́̽̈́̓̉̒̍͆̏̾̾̆͆̋͗̒̌́̅̓̈͛̿͆̔̃̀͌͆̑͛̈́̐̆͋̇̄̏̂̇̐̈́̏̓͛́̃̐͑̿̔͗̈́͛͆͑̓̃̿̽̄͊́̃̒̈́́͑͊̌͆͐́̒̃͂͊̈́́͐̀̀͐̃̊̄̐̈́̐̊͊͛͛͗̑́̈̈́̒̃̒̍̌̓͆̀̆̆̐̑̒͊̀̾̂̍̆́͆͋̀̈́̈́̅͑̾͑̈́̌̆̈́̂̓̇̆̄͛̆͐̿̚͘̕͘̕̚̚̕̕̕̕͘̚͘͘̚̚̚̚̕̚̚̚͘͘̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͠͠͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̴̸̵̶̷̵̵̶̶̷̸̶̵̶̵̸̶̸̡̨̨̢̨̡̨̧̢̢̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛͈̯̩̲̜͔̻̺̻͈̦̭̹͙̞͍̟̲͇̥͉͙̼̜̭͇͕̺̬̫̣̙̪͔͖̖̤̤̼̱͇̣͚͔̘͉̬̬͖͓̜̱̖̬͈̞͔̫̖̤̹̱̯̦̲͉̜̥̜̼̻͔̥̥͈̺̣͚̹̰̮̤̠̜̱̞̠͚̻̞̼͔̳̞͍͕̟̣̘͙̩̣͕̻̺̥͈͚͚̙̻̲̭̭̜̹͚̣̯͙̹͉̙͚͈͇̻̘͕͙̟̫̼̹͍̩̯̳̜̭̦̝͚͕̲͔̝̝̘͙̠̲͎̙̜̭̬̥̠̹̻̥̗̼̤͇̘̘͕̦̟͕̼̠̝̯̞̫̰͓̬̗͉̪̗̥̺̥̦̥̭͚̳̜̺̖̪̤̲̤͍̪͇̳͙͕̞̥͓̱͈̦̰͈̻͇̩̳̞̙̦͎̞͙͈̭̼̬͙̱̘̘̹̙̥͈͖̗̳̬̞̺̦͛̅͋̓̌͛͋͐̇͊̿̓̇̃͗͑̍̈́̇͑̌͒͗͌͋̍͊̀̎͗̾̃̆̑̾̑͗͆̆͂͗̀͂̾̓̍͛͋̅̐͐̍̐͌͆̑͛̋̏̆̾̔̉̄͆̏͗̑̔̽͒͆̇̈́̽͛͋́̎̅̉̎̽̋̿̾͒͂̾͑̉̅̀̍̎͐͒̂͊̅̆̒̈́̅͆̇̇̂͗̏̓́͆̑̃͗̈́̍̍̅̏̑̉̒͌̽͛̉͒̇̈͋̈́̊̄͂̋̈́̑͋̾͊͊̋̊͑̂̆̈̈́̀̆̈̎̔͛̈̅͂̍͌͊̊̈́̐͐̆͌͊͑͋̔̇́̿͌̐͌̊̈́̎͆̋͛͂̀̀͂̅͌̇̿͋̑̓̎̈́̄͊͆̊̔̎͛̽͒̂̈́̐̀̾͒̀̈́͋̄͐̊̌́̾͌͊͒̔́̓̍͐́̈́̐̐̀̐̌̀͐̈́́͊̾́̍͘͘̚̕̚̚̕͘̚̕͘̕̚͘͘͘͘̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͠͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ?̶̶̶̴̸̷̵̵̶̸̴̶̸̴̶̴̵̴̵̸̸̴̴̶̵̸̷̸̷̢̡̢̨̡̨̧̨̧̢̨̡̨̡̢̧̨̢̢̧̧̢̧̢̨̢̢̧̡̧̨̧̧̢̧̨̡̧̨̢̢̧̨̢̡̨̡̧̢̡̧̨̡̢̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̙͚͖̜̺͎̱̳͙̯̖̲͈̳̟̹̥̻̯̱̜̰̝̱̱̦̜͖̟͉͚̗̹͕͇̳̟̲̞̝̭̮͍̥̝̝̞̗̙̤̯̱̻͍͚͇̠̙̟͎͈͔͇͉̼̳͉̥̮͎̙͉͎̗̲͓̜͔͓̲̟͈̩̞̼̺̺̥̝̖͍̞̜̤̲̭̜͙̘̦̪͇͖̤̩̫̼̦͖̲̩͓͈̖̥̲̝̟̠̯̹͍̱̣̤̮̳͉̜̥̝̲͎̦̰̬͈̹̳̜̣̟̙̲̱͉̮͓̱̺̮̰͍̪͉̫͔̘̤͚̝̘̱͇̟̳͉̞̮̲͙͇͕̖̯̣̰̳̣̖̯͙͉̮̙͚̦̜̼̫̲͈̗̼̼̤̭̣̫̻̻̫̭͇̹̹̣̲͓͍̭̮̰͎̤̣̲̻͙͈͇̬͙̰͕̲̣̼̬͈̭̦͙̦̝͔͔̗̯͖͙͖̤͉̺̯̗̩͇͍̼̦̞͔̻̼̫̱̭̯̩̥͎͎͓̼̙̦̟̹͎̥̺͕͔̠̥̗̭̻̭̖͚͕͔͕̦̦̖̯̜͖͚̘̠͓̣̥̩̞̪͇̮̲͖͓̜̬̻͓̳̠̥̤̘͙͇̜͖̺͕̭̖̤̳̟̳͉̣̣̣̼̗̖͎̣͓̳̝̙̝̭̲͎̝̹̻̘̙̳̤͍̲̘̹̻̪̺̪͉̤̠̬̯͕̘̦͇̺̼͎̦͎̺̙̭̬̳̠̝̜̺͓̯̣͇͍̦̙̮̰̞̩̼̦̻̻͈͔̣̬̬̻̝̹̼̘͈̦̥̠̲̘̭̺̭̺̥̤̪̠̣̫͓̻̫̰̖̬͎̗̰͕̘̣̗̮̻̣̺̯̝̺͍̹͓͍̩͓̹͓̲̺̙͕̙̻̼͈̞̩̼̝̟͇̙̣̫̠̪̟̻̻̱͚̥͍̭̜̠̺̮̟̥͉̫͕̹͈͈̹͍̗͈̰̯̲̥̰̠͚̤̠̜͎̳̘̲̞̼̙̗̟̖̥̠̗̰̖̮̥̼̤̺̻̜͍̠͎̳̫̳͚̟͎̬͈̳̹̯̻̰̫̫̥͎̳̩̙͉̩͕̟̟̙͚̠̭̞̪̭͔͙̻̘̯̲͔̫͚̼̭̹̳͕̙̥̹̩͇̗̟̳͔̰̟͈̫͓̘̳̼̳̪͔͎̮͎̮͈͚͍̖͈̉́̀̈́́́̅͆͊̏̄̐̊̊̀̀̈̉̍̃̿̐͐̀́͐̈́͋̋̽͌̽̇́̍̂̅͒̓͐̀͒̂̾̓͒̂̾́͋͒̆̈́͗͌̃̋̈́͐̈́̂̈́͒̆͛̐̽̌̍̀̾̑͋̂̐̽̽͆̎̋͒̽̈́̈͊̅̌̆͒̆̍̂̈́̐͛̀̌́̊͋͂̀͒̍̀̎̈́͂͒̇̽́̋̇́̌̊͋͒̊̒͊͂̈̌̓̋͌͊̀͂̇͊͛͌̈́̄̀̿̏̎̆́̉̄͒̑̽́̊̅̅̂̐̏́͊̔̇̓̓͂̔̈́̾͐̓̌̀̃̀̓̎̾̀͒̓̏͂͂̂̽͊̐̔͋̉̃͆̍̓͋̈̒̈͌̊̽̽̇̀̄͂͒̔̈͗͂͗̎͛̐̏̔͗̀̒͌̉̎̂̂͂̓̾́͂̀̆̑̍̾̍͒̔͋̎͗̒̈́͆͋̐̐̑͛̂͛̒̉̄͐̂̾̿̒́͒̒̾̀̄̀̌̅̐̓́́͆͑͑̃̋͒͌̾̊̎̽́̇̽̍̒̈́̍̄͑͆͋͆̿̂̾͆͑͊̿̂́̈́̑͐̑͆̀̽̿͒͐̐̀́̐̌͌̈́̿̆͆̇́̑̐̒̈́̓̏͊̈̈̍̾̅͆̑̇͑̂͆͛͊̈́̆̏͒́̂̍̄̃̍̀̊̏̌̽́̆̌̌̒̅͊͑̅̈́̎̋̉͊̇͋̈̔̅̑̉̈͒͛̂͌̈͐̌̏̀̑̆̏̀́̅̍̒͗͑͒̆̈̍́̍͐̆̄̽̎̉͌͊̒͋͑̽̂̔̃̀̅̒̊͌̊̽͊̑̄͌́̾̅̓͗́̈́͗̃͋̈́̄̒̍̌͆̈́̀̉͐̂̑̿͗̀̋̐͑̔̀̉̌̊̆͒̋̇̇̈̀̾̾͒͊̾̓̅̏̂̅̈́͛̎͆̅͂͑̉̆̾̓́̈́̎̒͑̊̔̌̋͂̍̔̋͒́̄́̓̅̎̊̃̌́̽͑̃̾͋͛̇̾̔̎̈́͛̄̑́̌̀̈́̉̒̇̇́̀̇̓̀͛̅̂̃͐̈́̇̋̈́͋̉̀̓͋͆͌͑͌̌́̈́̒̑̔̀̉̒̓̐̇̇́͐̿́̽͒̑̓͛̒̒͆̒̉̾̔̂̌̏̀͂̉̂̐͛̋͗̈́̃͗̐̕̕͘̕͘̚̕͘̕̚̕̚̚̚̕̕͘̕̚̕̕̚͘̕͘̚̚̕̚̕̚̕̚̚̕͘͘̚̚͘͘͘͘͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̷̵̢̨̨̡̛̹̞̝͈͙̩͈̟̘̯̦̳̭̰͇̲̳̩͇̲͔͚̗̙̬̯͚̝̩͉̖͇̜̬̞͚̯̩̼̥̫̯̹̩̩̳̮̞̳̖̞̜̰̯̼͎͉̮̭͂͌͐̎̔̾̈̐͋͆͗͛̋̀͛̊͐͑̍͒̐͜͜͜͝͝ͅͅͅẇ̸̷̴̶̵̷̷̴̴̵̶̶̶̵̵̷̴̴̴̷̸̶̴̶̷̸̷̷̷̶̸̸̡̧̢̡̧̧̨̢̡̨̨̢̨̧̢̧̢̧̧̢̡̧̡̢̢̡̨̡̨̡̡̧̡̧̨̧̢̡̧̧̢̡̧̨̡̧̡̧̢̨̧̧̡̧̧̧̡̨̢̢̡̢̢̢̧̡̢̢̡̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̪͎̱̳̰͇̺̝͔̩̲͍͙̤̗̰̻͍͍̟̻̺̣̘̪͚͖͇̣͇̤̗̞̜̜̫͙͎̜̠̪̘̺̪̺̫͓̙͔̙̤̫̖͓͉̘̯̦͔̞͚̰͍̗͎͚̥̹͈̰̞̟̘̟͖͙̤͇̺͕̜͖̱͇̥̦͇̝͖͕͎̝̪͙̲͕͔̺̪͙͖̣͚͈͕̟̰͍̜͔͔̝̖̮̟̹͉̼̬̟̲̖̼̘͈̞̟̣̖͕͎̱̫̫̞̣̳̞̹̩̩͈͙̩̺̯̳͇̙̦̠̣̬͇͎̹̹̪̝̦̼͎̯̩̲̞͍̟͓͕͇̱͎̞̞̻̺̩̮͈̼̱̺̭̭͚͖͖͖̣̟͇͚̫͇̹̖͈̥̤̗̲̬̖̺̝͔͚͎̼̪̬̞͇͇͓̪͇͖̫̯͕̭͕̤̞͚͈̻̠͔̬̞̫̣͓̟̮̙͉͔̬̞̠͚͇͈̙͕̦̻͍̩͈̙͔͍̙̰̲̫̗̬̮̜̼̦̮͎̫̼̻̹̯̯̝̗͔͍̻̬̤̼̪͍̺̩̯̪͓̰̤̳̪̻̫͓͓͙͎̥̬̲͇̯̞̺̼͚̝͇̣̯̠̝͉̤̹͈̘͙̱̟͉͎̩̭͇̙͍̬͎̠͖͍̭̝̻͎͓̜̩͎̩̙̩͈̫̗͕̝̩̮̙͕͚̝͙̫̞͕̭͈̖̲͚̗̤͕̺̼͈͇̼̫͚̫̟͈̰̪͈͈̺̤͎̙͓̗̟̳̖̤̫͔͈͈̼̮̰̩̫̖̩̗̯̗̞̝̩͉̗̘̦̞̺̼̻̲̩͎̦̳͈̤͍̫̠̺̹͇̮͖̯͕͍̤̪̪͔͉̩̦͉̗͖͍͓̻̘͚͓̣̥͎̫̘̖̳̖̳͉̱̤͇͎̣̩̫̟̘̰͎͙̮͍̬̥̳̙̖͔̹̗̺͕̳͖̤̤͖̤͇̗̗̤̺͉̞̲̤̙̠̮̫̼̪͇͍̘̣̼̗̮̳̺͚̱͚͚̮̳̺̙͔̹̦̙̰̗͚̟͚͖̜̪͎̩̠͍̱̭͈͇͕̠̼̺̩͖̰̞͈̭̪̞̮̰̘̘͓͎͔̟̗̼̘̲̝͕͓̲͇̖̠̙͈͚͉͍̰̤̣͉͎͈̼͚̘̤̜̠̼̦̗̠͓͙͖̬̜̹̹͎̙̝̰̲̖̪͎̝͍̤̰͕̰͇̙̞̮̫͔̤̳̪̼̻̙̹̜͈̳̰̫̻̰̥͎͓̞̯̙̰͈͇͎͙͙̖̰̳̭͉͕̳͍̠̳͙̞̰̩̥͎̘̲̣̟̥̥̭͇͓̂͐́͆̈́̉̒̌̈́̋́̑͛̄̆̌̒̈́̉͋͑͆̂̊̍̄̄͆̇̓̒̽̍̋̈́̓̈́́̋̒̉̀͐̇̔̂̃̿̓͆̒̀̈́͑̽̈͊́̔̔̑̀̃̑̃̅͆̅͗̆̀͆̇̊̆̋͑͊̇̈́̇͛͗̂̈́̓́͗͌̃͛͛̍̎̓͗̓̈́͛̽̾̿̋͒̈́̈́̈́̈́̃͊͂̂̈͗̊̓̍̀̾͌̏̅́̅̈́͐̑̉͑͐̔͊̈̾̎̑̋͆͆̉̔̾̇̋̋̇̎̓̄̈́̋̓̎̃̍̅̋̈́̍̓̆́̿̽̄̌́̊̄̓̍̎̔̄̈́̈̀̇̅̑̾̊̎͊̐̔͂͑̑̓͆̂̀̐͐̆͆̄͛̌̒̉͒͑̀̎̊̊́̈́̄̊̎̋̌̈̇̈́̽̔̒̒̇̃̆̿̅̈̄̋͌͑̊͛̓̔̂̃̔̾̿̏͗͑͋̌̈́̓̋͐͑̓͑̀̏̆̓̋̀̉̅̍̍̀̉̾̅̈̽̓͛͑̂̑̍̍̿͑͛̂̀̆͆̆͂͐̅́̓̈́͊̈́̒͐̃̇͗͑͐͌̌͊͋̈́́́̌́̄̄̍̈͒̓͆͒͐͋̉̓͆̐́̾̿͂͗̍̑̀͋͂̓̂̾̾͊̈́̈́̉̒̂̅̿́̓̒̆̓͋̄̏̀̆̄́̔͒̀͌̾̐̈͛̓̌̉͒̇̐̉̆̐̂̈́̊̎̔͑̓̑̓̓̏̏͗͌̑͌̏̔̽͐͛͊̈́̈́̉̈́̃͂̈́͌̍̆́̄̈́̔͌́͐̊̓̾͌̿͛͋͂̾̑̓̎̎̀͊̈́͐͛͋͑̽̈̈́̈́̐̒̈́̌̽̀̈̌͋̈́̍̃̃̒̉̍̓̎͐̉̈́͗͗̀̓̾̒̄͊̈́̾̾̋̏̈́͆͆̀̏̏́̓̔͗́̈́̈́́͛̂̈́̀̽͊̓̈́̂̄͛̃̒̌̍͊̀͐̿̾̈́́̐̈̇̿̈́̾͊̎̏̿͆̉̉̊͋̇͒̒̽̍̇͂͊̓̀͗̄͗̅̽̿̈́̓̒̂̈͆͋̓̈̓̅̇̈́̐̈͂̉̇̓̀̈́̐͌̀͗̄̈́̀͗͌̈̐̐̽̽̌͂̓̀̅͒̏̓̓̾̎͑̀͆̑͐̒́͊́͆͐͐̏̾͋̌́͛̈́̋̇̐̔͂̆͐̓̆̆͂̑̽̔́̓̓͗̽̑̑͑̓̍̄̉͊͊̽͋͂͐͐̉̈͒̑̑͊̈͌́͒̑͆̔̅̀̐̌͆̎̕̕̕̚̕͘̚̚̚̕̚̚̚̕̕̕͘̚̚̚͘̕͘̕̚̕͘̕̚͘̚̕̕̚̕͘͘͘̕͘̕͘̚̚̚̚̕̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͝͝͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅą̸̴̷̸̵̸̴̶̵̷̡̧̧̨̧̨̨̡̧̨̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̫͕͕̪͚̮͕̲͖̞͈͔͚̫̻̙̠̠̩̩͖̣͙͙̗͕͓͎͉̜̣͔̱̲̫͙̤͙͈̹̭̩͕̼̪͈̪̩̺̝̼͎̤̤̥͚̘̺̩̺̰͕͈̤̗͓͉̟͔̖͕̣̞̳̭̦͓̟͍̤̩͖̭̙͎̳̺͕͇͕̼̩̦̲̪̺̼̲̩͖̘͉̣̳̱̹̱̟̪̥͇͍͇̣̼̠̬̪̭̮͙͓͕͎̫͚͖̙͉̇̆̓͂͐̏́̓̎̈͑́͛̆͆̑̎̀̀͛̈́̌̍̈́̇̈́̉̍̒̈̓̍́͗͛̊͛̾͊͒͑͊̑̒̉͒͆́̈̓̎̄̈́̉̏͑͛̂́̈́̄̑̑͑͋̅͗̎̈̊̈́́͂͆̑̅̏͌̈́̎͂̄́͒̔͆͒̌̒̉̽̑͋̽̓̊̄̔̃̄̎͒̑̀̽̈́͂̀͊̊̿̌̒̌̇̋̏͒̔̅̓͑̓̏̓̽͊̌͗̔̄̆̇̆͛̓͂̇͛̿̽̐̐͒͆̿̓̓̌̔̌̉̇͆͛̿̃͑́̀͗̔͘̚̕̕͘͘͘͘̚̕̚͜͝͝͝͝ͅͅ ̵̵̷̴̵̷̷̸̶̷̷̶̸̴̵̴̷̷̵̷̵̢̡̡̧̡̢̡̨̧̢̢̡̧̨̨̡̢̢̡̡̧̨̢̢̨̨̨̨̡̢̧̧̢̡̧̢̡̨̧̧̧̨̧̡̨̨̨̡̨̨̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̳̪̟͉̯̖͖̮̩͕̖̳̫͓͎̱͈͈͚̻͕͇̬̺̭̬̞͓͙̫̤̖͎͕͚̺̮̣͖͔̠͔̥̹̫͓̩̹̻͉̺̫̳̳̘͕̱͔̥͉̯͓̜̱̰̖͚̙̙͓͓͍͈͖̻̱̘͚͇̯̥̼̹͍̺̱͔͚̘̺͇̭̪̼͎̖̗̝̮̗̰̼̲͇̤̟̖̦̺̫̘̘̦̪̜̯͕̳̤̙̹͉̦̦͎̜̳͍̺͙̝̰̞̲͙͔̯͚͓̞̯͖̞̻̲͕͙̰̦̩̼̗͇̘̻̭̻̙̳̺̺̦̖̝̰͎̘͔͔̤̘̞̯͈͉̙͔͙̲͇̮̱̤̰̼̤̲͈͎͎̤̳͈͓̗͇̟͚͕̻̥͇͉͖̼̥̝̺̭̱̘̤̰̩̣̪̖̤̘̻̝̗͖͔̻̺̳̗̗̞͔̫̼̪͍̼̲̱̖̜̭͖̲͔̣̞̜͎̯̹̟̥͖̲̤̗͇̣̥͍͉̙̩̺̼̪͉̝̭̺̙̣̳̮̗̮̹͍̯͈̺̣̠̥̟̮͚͓͕̩̣̗̰͚͇̼̝̟͔͔̳͓̣̩̤̠̪̪̠̞̰̼̜̦̤̩̘̘̖͇̝̩͚̟̱͕̯̪̳̖͎̲̣̲͎͚̝̺͔̠̱̳̥̙͕͎͕͉̜̟̞̻̩̝̞̣͕̹͖̼̺͈͉͚̣͎̘̦̝̯͉͇̹͉̻̤̞͕̱͈͓̼̝͖̮͙̱̘̬̜̩͍͇͔̩̙̼̫̘̹͖̤͈̣͉̟̦̗̯͕̜̫̩̭̪̪͇̙̘͚͇̱̝̜̮̦̪̫͍̲̳͓͔̬̰͎̳̫͓͙͎̝͎̯̰̞̻̓͐̓̇̊̐͛̎̾̀̅̽̃̿̾͑̎̎̑͌̇̿̃̋͋͐̓̀̎̋͌̿̐̐̋͌̐̔̑̑̇͆̈́̏͂̅͑̑̔̐͑̓͌̄͗̆̊͆͊͆̂̔̾́͂̀̀̀̉́̂̾̆̌̉́̈́̏͒̅̑͒̓̌͌͗͌̃̈̀̂̊̔͗̈́́̌̐̇͗̃̈́̐͆͐͒̋́͒͌͆̉̌̒͗͗́͆͂̆̀̀̓̎͐̂̀͛̎̏̎͋̀̏͆̓̈̒̆͗͐͋͗͐̈̇̌̈͛̑͑̒̊͋̽͋̈́̂̒̿̏͂̃͂͂͌́̌̈́̎̿̅̈͊̈́̑̿̇̉̉̐͐͋͛̍̃͐̽̒̉̿́̓̊̑͂̉̒͌͛̅͋̐͊͋͂̿̃̋̽̓̒̐͋̃̀͒̆̌̐͂̈́̓̀̆͊̄̅̐̋̾͆͐̄͊͋͗͌͒̌͒̉̋̿͑͛̃͂́̇́̈́̃̇͋̌̎̎̌̈́̈̿̾̃͒͂̒͑͋̿̇̌̈́̃̌̈́̃̌̓̍̈̾̌͛̾͛͑̆͊́̅́̀̊͋̑̑̑̈́͛̈́̈́̑̀̂́͑̈́̓̓̀̓͂̒͌͛̾̿͐̀̿̏͂͌̑̈͆͊̂͌̾̾͛̐̀̓̌̿̒̊́͋͗͗̍̃̒͒̎͆͊̅͌̋̈̈̌͆͂̍̓̆̈́̏̂̉̓͂́̉̽͊̌͋̐̎̒̎̂́͆́͗̓͒̑͋̇̏͂̓̓̍̀͒̾̈̍̽͑̈́̇͊͋̽͌̑̔͂̃̊̓͆̽̀̏͛̅̑̃̈̑̓̈͐̋̉͑́̏̂̽͗͋̇́̌̓͋̀͐̏̌̌͌̒͑̈́̌̏̂̓̇̋̅̿́͛͒̈͛̄̀̊͛̍̆̿͗͂͌̄̾̕̕͘̚̚͘̕̕͘̕̚͘͘͘̚̚̚̕̚͘̕̕͘͘̕͘͘̚̕̚͘̕͘̕̕̕̚̕͘͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͝͝͝͝͠͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͠͝͝͠͝͝͝ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅw̶̸̸̵̸̴̵̵̷̸̷̸̷̴̵̶̴̴̶̡̡̨̢̡̡̢̧̨̢̢̨̡̨̢̨̢̢̨̧̧̢̨̡̧̨̡̧̢̨̨̧̧̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̛̗͈͙͙̲̱͉̟͍̞̦͇̤̗̯̱̟̠̯̖̙̲͇̹̞̱̜̬͖͖̮̘̝̱̜͇͔̖̘̬̫̝̜̱̠͖̘̰̞̲̭͔̹̥̦̰̼̠̗̲̻͉̞͔̣͇͇̥̲͎̙̙̟̜̜̠͎͇̝͎͎̱̟̯͔̗̯̺͉̜͙̠̰̰͚͓͕̱̥̼͙̦̞̜̦̟̳̭̜̞̲͎͎͈͔̦̬̰̻̺̣̱͖͔̜̘̺͍̬̳̜͖̹̩̹̫̻̤̯̪̣͎̠͈̤̞͙͉̫̜̺̟̘̫͉͙̗̜͍̩̤̥̖̼͚͔͖̯̺̫̤̻̮̣̟̱̫̬̙̯͈̥̞̻̪̤̻̠͕͔͔̭̫̙͉̗͓̮͍̰͍͖̩͍̖͚͔̠͉̟̱̪̝̗̬̗̫̞̙͚͍̳͎͍͕͇͉̱̯̤̪͍̼̥̰̹̲̯͓̞̩̣̬̮̹̙̠̼̲͚̘̫͖͔̫̩̼̤͖̰͚̹̳̬̦̝̬̦͇̬͉͔̦̬̣͎̩͚͓̪̦͈̜̗̫̯̪͉͙͉̗̣͍̘͔͙̘̱͍̼̘͚͎͔̝̻͇͍̱̝̟̜̠̥̗͇͉͍̠̖̤̲͉̘̲͙̼͚̰̤̼̭̬̻͇̺͚̬̪̭̖͉̘͎͍͖̘͖̫̙̩̝̗̘̬̺͎̳̺͍͙͈͍̦̥̋̾̅̒͆͋̂̿̈́̆̿͊͂́̎͗̒̽̉́̽̑̂̈͂̂̍̾͆͑͆̆͊̒̑́͌͆͊̆͐͂̓͒̍̊̂̃́̔̄̽͛͒͊̑̑͒͛͑̎̔̿̐̏̎́̌̈́̑̄̍̈́̌̍͑̿̓̿͊̑͑̌̈́̅̑̑͂͂̒̒̀̌̉͊͂̈̽̄̂͐̍͌͒̄̽̀̊͋̀̄̏̆̐̍͐̄̉̄͛͗̿̐̔̄͂͑̒́͐́̉̎̊̎̓͋́̈́̄̃͐͒̒̊̓̇̈̑̿͛͐̀̇͌͂̀̋̐̉̍͋̌̔͐̈́͐̒̅̾̽̊̐͐̍̔͑̌͊͒̈́̂͗̒̍̆͂͒͒̈́͐́̈́̌̀̆͂̈́̾̈́͆̒̓̌̾̊̌̈́̄̆̋̀̾͂̿̆̌̊̆͆̐̓͐̈̊́̒̎̈́͊̈́̃̑̎͐̾́̏̈́̓̊̾́͌͛̒̊̀̇͊̎̽͊̅̈̊̿̅̄̓̓̅̋̂͋͗̓͂͋̄̈́̔͆̈́͊̒̈́̎̀́̆̂̃͂̌̑͐͒͆̏̿͂̋͒̓͛̑͊͋̑̾̌̓͋̀̀͆͂͑̐͂̌͛̃̐͂̂̊̆́̉͑̅̆͐́̉̏͑̓̆̀̈̿̀͆́̎͋͗͊̒̿̌̈́͂̅̾͂͌͂͒́͌͒̅̾̑̋͆̿̿̄͗̏̅͊̇̋͋̍̋̆́́͒̀̏̾̐͐͊̾̎͛̑͆̓͊͂́̃͌̇̄͑͂̌̾̌͂̏̆͂̏́̚͘̚̚͘͘̚̚̕̕̕͘̕͘̚͘̕͘̕͜͜͜͜͜͜͝͝͠͠͝͠͝͠͝͠͝͝͠͝͝͝͠͝͝͠͝͠͠͝͝͝͠ͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅͅ ̸̶̧̡̡̡̧̨̡̢͎̥͍̪̩̱̱͓̖̩͉̤͓̙̬͎̲͔̘̺̤̟̬̩̦̣̟̗̺͖̦̭̬̣͙̘̤͉̦͓͙̫̖͉̺͉̘͚͓̮̙̘̦͇̱̥͍̜̥͍̯͈͇͔͍͚͉̹͙̼͔̦͎̮̪̺͖̥͎̫͓̰̲̣̥̪̥͈̍̉͊̑̂͛̾͂̋͗̐̊͋͐̑̇̓̈́́̅̐̑̔̕͘͘͜ͅͅͅ ?why always me ?why always me ? why

    • Longer content block

    Every time I think about the road ahead, I remember that the path is never truly straight. It bends, it breaks, it surprises, and still it carries us forward with a strange kind of grace. The people we meet, the lessons we learn, the pain we endure, and the hope we hold are all stitched together into a story that becomes larger than any one moment.

    There are nights that feel endless, mornings that arrive too quietly, and seasons that seem to pass without offering any explanation. Yet life keeps moving, and each step, no matter how small, changes the shape of the future. We grow through confusion, through doubt, through loss, and through the stubborn decision to keep going when giving up would feel easier.

    What matters most is not always the visible result, but the strength we build while trying. A single act of courage can inspire a lifetime of change. A small kindness can echo farther than we expect. A moment of patience can calm a storm that once felt impossible to survive. The world is made of these ordinary acts, repeated again and again, until they become something extraordinary.

    Some days feel heavy with doubt, and some days carry a lightness that feels almost unreal. Both are part of the same journey. We do not need every answer before we begin. We only need the willingness to keep moving, to keep learning, to keep believing that there is still more to discover beyond the horizon.

    When the ground beneath us feels uncertain, we can still choose to stand. When the future seems unclear, we can still choose to hope. When the past feels too heavy to carry, we can still choose to release it, one piece at a time, until we are lighter than we were before. Life is not a single perfect moment; it is a collection of countless efforts, quiet victories, and brave repeats.

    This page is meant to feel long because it carries many thoughts, many reflections, and many small truths that deserve space to breathe. It is a reminder that length is not always about excess; sometimes it is simply the space needed to hold what matters. A sentence can comfort, a paragraph can unfold, and a full page can hold more feeling than a single line ever could.

    There is beauty in persistence, in returning even when the return feels difficult. There is strength in honesty, in admitting fear without surrendering to it. There is peace in taking one breath, then another, and letting the day unfold without forcing it to be perfect. That is how many lives are lived: not in dramatic leaps, but in patient continuation.

    Even the smallest hope can become a foundation. Even the weakest light can guide someone home. Even a quiet voice can carry the courage to speak when silence has gone on too long. The human story is built from these small but lasting choices, chosen again and again until they become part of who we are.

    So if this feels long, then let it be long. Let it hold all the things that cannot be rushed. Let it make room for reflection, for emotion, for memory, and for the strange comfort of knowing that life is bigger than one brief moment. In the end, what matters is not only where we arrive, but how deeply we lived while we were still on the way.

    We keep going because there is still meaning in the effort. We keep waiting because there is still tenderness in the hope. We keep reaching because there is still something worth holding onto, somewhere beyond the distance, somewhere just beyond the next step. And that is enough for now.
